chapters.title: Chapter 907 - Soaring Fury
chapters.body:
Chapter 907 - Soaring Fury

Chapter 907: Soaring Fury

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

What did it mean? Of course it meant that all the previous words were no longer true!

According to the previous agreement, the five ancient gods and Lakshmi CIty would ally to deal with Asura. The only condition was that the newly advanced Ancient Goddess Brunhilda would be exchanged and they could bring her to the divine palace.

In the plans of the five ancient gods, however, Ancient Goddess Liu Qing was the heir of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi and should have inherited her sound laws.

None of the abilities passed down by the master god were weak, but after the appearance of power of belief, the strength of the seven ancient gods began to change, and a clear ranking appeared. Ancient Goddess Lakshmi was at the very bottom, and just above her were Yaksha and Vishnu. When based on that, how could Liu Qing, a newly advanced ancient goddess, be an opponent of the five ancient gods?

Even if all of them were suppressed to the god realm, they could still beat her.

But reality showed that Ancient Goddess Liu Qing didn’t walk the path of practicing sound laws, but rather that of close quarter combat. She possessed a formidable physical body, and even Garuda, who was the most powerful among them, was beaten until he lost almost all his feathers.

Indra put on a fake smile and slowly said, “Does Ancient Goddess Liu Qing not understand my meaning? Even if you won the competition, whether there’s an alliance or not, or when we fight against Asura, that will be decided by us.”

When he said that, the faces of the twelve holy daughter turned dark, but they didn’t say anything. From the time the five ancient gods sensed the presence of Lakshmi’s soul in Asura, Lakshmi City’s position became weak. The five ancient gods knew that Ancient Goddess Lakshmi had sustained serious injuries under Asura’s attack, and they took advantage of it.

Their original plan was to swallow Lakshmi City completely, but after Ancient Goddess Brunhilda appeared, they felt somewhat afraid and used her as a bargaining chip for an alliance to deal with Asura. But despite losing the competition, the five ancient gods wanted to keep the authority in their hands and brazenly denied their previous words.

A smile appeared at the corners of Brunhilda’s lips and she slowly said, “Then what condition do you five ancient gods have for allying to deal with Asura?”

“Very simple. As long as Ancient Goddess Liu Qing follows us to our divine palace, we five ancient gods will ally with Lakshmi City to deal with Asura.”

When Indra saw that Liu Qing herself mentioned the issue, he felt

great. Since Ancient Goddess Liu Qing spoke about the problem, it meant that she had spent quite some time thinking about it.

After all, she was an ancient goddess of Lakshmi City, so how could she not think of her clan? If Lakshmi City didn’t ally with the five ancient gods, how would they deal with Asura? Only with cooperation could they seize back the missing part of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi’s soul from Asura, which would allow her to recover completely.

In such a situation, Liu Qing only had one good option.

Brunhilda looked at the smiling Indra, and a hint of disgust appeared in her eyes. Previously, she didn’t know what sort of ghost had possessed the five ancient gods, so she believed that they had fallen for the mortal body of Pipa Clan’s ancestor and so mentioned such a condition. However, just a moment ago, she had learned from Li Yunmu that the five ancient gods were colluding with the powers from beyond the heavens.

In order to become master gods, they wanted to offer her as sacrifice to earn favor with the yin son of heaven, who was a person from beyond the heavens.

From an ancient goddess, they wanted to turn her into a lowly servant. Such a plan made Brunhilda, an ancient goddess of the Land of Ice, hold them in contempt. Disdain was all she felt when she looked at them.

“What are you all when you can’t even beat an old woman like me? And you still want to put up conditions!”

A cold smile appeared at the corners of Brunhilda’s lips, and she erupted with ancient goddess’ presence, then extended her hand and grabbed the descendants possessed by the five ancient gods.

Under the pressure of an ancient goddess, Indra who was originally filled with smiles lost his composure and loudly howled, “You b*tch, are you mad? You dare to attack us five ancient gods? Your Lakshmi City will be wiped out!”

“Damn it, vixen!”

The jade white hands suppressed the five ancient gods, and five balls of light flew out of the bodies of the god level descendants. They rushed toward the divine palace in the sky. Once suppressed, the descendants of the five ancient gods turned into dust without a chance to wake up again.

At the same time, the presence of a second ancient goddess erupted nearby, and Lakshmi’s voice spread through the whole Laksmi City.

“From now on, all ties between this seat and you five ancient gods are broken. If you dare to descend in Lakshmi City with your mortal bodies, I will make sure you all disappear forever.”

The souls of five ancient gods continued cursing while rushing toward the divine palace in the sky.

Brunhilda raised her head and looked at the five soul parts with a calm expression. When the five ancient gods returned to the divine palace, they would soon discover that Heavenly Grand Ritual had disappeared. At that time, they could only ally with Lakshmi City and send troops to attack Asura City.

Right then, Brunhilda really wanted to see the reaction of the five ancient gods when they saw that Heavenly Grand Ritual was missing.

While thinking about it, she began to smile. When the surrounding Music Clan’s descendants heard the two ancient gods being so aggressive, the haze in their hearts was completely swept away, and they began to cheer excitedly. The twelve holy daughters walked over and looked at Brunhilda with hesitation clear on their faces.

“Now that Lakshmi City had a falling out with the five ancient gods, I am afraid…” one of the holy daughters said.

Lakshmi City had two ancient gods right then, but only a part of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi’s soul remained, and she could only display the might of ancient goddess by relying on power of belief. She was like a paper tiger.

That meant that only Brunhilda could be considered as a genuine ancient goddess in the clan. But although she possessed formidable strength, there were enemies on both sides. How could she deal with five ancient gods by herself?

Liu Bailing, who was the weakest, looked at the expressions of the other holy daughters but didn’t say anything.

Brunhilda looked at the hesitation on everyone’s faces and said with a faint smile, “That will depend on whether these five ancient gods dare to attack Lakshmi City. Without the Heavenly Grand Ritual, they won’t let Asura suppress Ancient Goddess Lakshmi’s soul.

“Because of that, their only option will be to form a sincere alliance with our Lakshmi City and attack Asura City!”

Holy Daughter Hu Shi’s eyes lit up at that moment. She recalled that Li Yunmu had gone to see Ancient Goddess Lakshmi previously… Could it be that he did so in order to steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual?

“Don’t tell me… At that time, Lord Yunmu went to find…”

Before Holy Daughter Hu Shi could finish speaking, Brunhilda placed a finger on her lips and mysteriously said, “Don’t say anything. The theft of Heavenly Grand Ritual has nothing to do with Lakshmi City. Our two ancient gods are present in the city, so the only one who could steal Heavenly Grand Ritual without being discovered is Asura.”

When the holy daughters heard Brunhilda’s words, the anxiousness disappeared from their faces and were replaced by smiles. Not one of them had a favorable opinion of the five ancient gods.

Once the Heavenly Grand Ritual was stolen, the five ancient gods could only request for an alliance with Lakshmi City, so the initiative would be in their hands. It would be very different from when the five envoys came and turned everything upside down.

In the divine palace, the souls of the five ancient gods passed through the barrier and flew into the sealed hall at the center to enter their bodies. The first one to wake up was Yaksha, and the moment he opened his eyes, he began swearing.

chapters.title: Chapter 908 - Everything Is Gone
chapters.body:
Chapter 908 - Everything Is Gone

Only after cursing for a very long time did Yaksha stop.

The second one to awaken was Garuda. He was beaten to a pulp by Brunhilda in the Music Clan’s residence and had fainted in the end. Once the part of his soul returned to the main body in the divine palace, he was the second to awaken, which showed just how formidable he was.

Garuda’s expression was gloomy, and the pupils of his golden eyes looked straight ahead, which gave him a majestic feeling.

Yet the scene of him being beaten by Brunhilda in the crack in space appeared in his mind, and humiliation washed over him. It could be said that from the time the heavens appeared, it was the first time he was bullied to such a miserable condition.

If he had been fighting with his main body though, Liu Qing wouldn’t have beaten him.

Vishnu and God Shiva opened their eyes together and noticed the swearing Yaksha and the ashen-faced Garuda who had yet to say anything. Indra, who was thrown into the lotus pond, also had an unpleasant expression, but he was in a slightly better condition. After all, compared to losing all hair like Gaurda, being thrown into the lotus pond was a trivial matter.

“What happened, what are the four of you looking at? Ancient Goddess Liu Qing is so formidable that even the five of us couldn’t beat her. Right now, Lakshmi City severed all ties with the five of us, so how about we go and attack directly,” Indra gloomily said. He wanted to descend on Lakshmi City and attack right away.

On one hand, he wished to return the humiliation, and on the other, he wanted to kidnap the heaven-shaking beauty Liu Qing and offer her to yin son of heaven.

Yin son of heaven had promised that as long as he was satisfied, he would reward the five ancient gods with the position of master god. It was an important matter. After all, they wanted to get in contact with the quasi true god expert Yin Emperor and rely on the power of beyond the heavens to survive. Such a backer might even allow them to create their own faction.

That was the real aim of the five ancient gods.

Vishnu and Yaksha looked at each other and slowly said, “We must curry favor with yin son of heaven, or we won’t be able to get in contact with Yin Emperor. This world doesn’t have much time left. The seal has loosened, and beyond the heavens can now send people inside. If we don’t use this opportunity and ride the big boat named Yin Emperor, I am afraid that we will die without leaving a body.”

“Start preparations and inform the cities under us to gather for an attack on Lakshmi City…”

Just as Garuda said that, Shiva who had remained silent until then cut him off. The other gods looked at him whose crescent moon-like eyes looked at the platform

“Who among the four of you moved the Heavenly Grand Ritual??” he asked in a quiet voice.

“Isn’t the Heavenly Grand Ritual…” Yaksha said with a smile as he turned to look at the platform. “On the platform!”

At the sight of the empty platform, the five ancient gods instantly erupted with formidable ancient god presence. Before parts of their soul had descended to the mortal world, the Heavenly Grand Ritual was on the platform in front of everyone’s eyes, and they had all descended together. When they returned, they also came together to the sealed room.

In other words, none of the five ancient gods could’ve tampered with it. There was also a defensive spell formation outside the hall and the divine palace, so if anyone had come in, they would have inevitably triggered it.

But from the time the competition began, the five didn’t sense any fluctuations in the defensive spell formation, which could only mean that someone familiar with it had entered.

The only people familiar with the divine palace and the sealed room’s spell formation were the seven ancient gods, including Asura and Ancient Goddess Lakshmi. Only those two were viable suspects, but before the five ancient gods departed the music clan’s residence, they had sensed the presence of Ancient Goddess Lakshmi erupt from the depths of Music Clan’s residence.

That left only one person—Asura.

“Asura!” Yaksha howled, and his deep blue skin began to shine. A black divine prong appeared in his hand.

“It could only be Asura. The only one who could steal the Heavenly Grand Ritual without disturbing the five of us is him. What’s more, it would be just like him to use the moment when we were healing to swallow Lakshmi’s soul.

“He really has wild ambitions. In order to make sure that we don’t find trouble with him after recovering our cultivation, he stole the Heavenly Grand Ritual,” God Shiva said in an icy tone after a moment of analyzing the situation.

Vishnu’s gaze flickered and he said with a panicked expression, “If Asura came to the divine palace, could he have discovered the existence of yin son of heaven as well!”

The five ancient gods looked at each other, and their figures flickered and disappeared from the sealed hall. When they appeared again, the five of them were outside the residence which yin son of heaven resided.

At that moment, the entire palace looked black from outside. A layer of strong yin presence permeated through the wall, obstructing the perception of gods from investigating inside.

While holding the divine prong in his hand, Yaksha walked forward to open the large gate of the palace hall, but Garuda stopped him and said in a calm tone, “Don’t burst in without permission. If the yin son of heaven is offended, you can forget about the position of a master god.”

When Yaksha heard him, he retreated a few steps. Garuda took the lead and walked to the great hall of the divine palace, then slightly stooped and said, “Yin son of heaven, we five ancient gods have come to pay a visit. We would like to trouble your distinguished self to open the door.”

There was no reply from the palace hall.

The five ancient gods waited for a while, then Garuda opened the large gate and walked inside. The palace hall was filled with strong yin energy, and the entire inner part’s temperature was extremely low. Yin son of heaven was lying on the main seat with his eyes closed while the black-robed man was standing respectfully by his side. A group of palace maids stood just below.

God Shiva looked at everyone standing motionlessly and waved his sleeve widely. The palace hall’s yin energy dissipated and yin son of heaven as well as the black-robed man disappeared too. Soon after, even the palace maids turned into dust and vanished in the air.

“Yin son of heaven is dead!” Vishnu mumbled in surprise.

The other four ancient gods frowned, then Yaksha said, “Perhaps he was tricked by Asura to go to Asura City to receive a visitor. Although yin son of heaven has said that our hospitality was great, there was no discussion about helping us. Perhaps Asura took out something which satisfied yin son of heaven…”

“Your theory is also possible! Yaksha, when yin son of heaven came to the divine palace, he said that he wasn’t the only one who came to Lanlou from beyond the heavens.

“Lakshmi had always been different from us. She didn’t use the power of belief and wouldn’t participate in such matters. So it is clear that if there’s another faction from beyond the heavens, they would be in Asura City.”

“Do you believe that beyond the heavens came to the Origin World looking for people to cooperate with? We all know what exactly they came for. Since yin son of heaven isn’t here, he was killed by Asura. That guy really does everything perfectly,” Indra said with some alarm.

Yaksha didn’t speak anymore. When the first battle of gods broke out, everyone learned about beyond the heavens. Afterwards, True God and the five master gods sealed the entire Origin World.

But the seal had finally started to loosen, so beyond the heavens dispatched people to the Origin World. They came to recruit natives to start fighting for territory.

Among the powers from beyond the heavens, many were hostile to each other. Once Asura killed yin son of heaven, the power from beyond the heavens behind Asura would naturally be excited for losing one competitor.

But the five ancient gods were not happy. Not only was the Heavenly Grand Ritual stolen, even the young master of the power on which they wanted to rely died in their divine palace.

Everything was gone!

chapters.title: Chapter 917 - The Battle Of Gods
chapters.body:
Chapter 917 - The Battle Of Gods

Chapter 917: The Battle of Gods

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“So many of you came, but you still couldn’t do anything about me. How about it, four clan patriarchs together with sixty god elders came for me, but I still managed to return alive,” Li Yunmu said with a calm expression while leaning against the wall.

“Hmph!”

The four patriarchs coldly snorted. They could think of only one thing right then, and it was that such a vile character had won.

The four clan patriarchs were quite sullen. They had taken sixty gods to kill Chen Xiu, but he still returned in intact condition. It was simply a huge joke.

The four patriarchs thought that they should have attacked Chen Xiu as soon as they saw him, which would have swiftly sealed the matter. Then, Chen Xiu would not have been able to return to Asura City and wouldn’t be standing against the gate and talking arrogantly before them.

They were filled with regret!

When Li Yunmu saw that the four patriarchs weren’t saying anything, he deliberately provoked them. “Do you remember the words I asked Yan Xiu to pass onto you? If you don’t remember, then go and carefully recall them.”

As he said that, a cold light flashed through the eyes of the four clan patriarchs while they looked at him. Yan Xiu had said that Chen Xiu would give them a return gift after coming back to Asura City. It was in reply to them dispatching fifteen gods to kill Chen Xiu. His promise was to show them in front of Asura.

With the fifteen gods in his hand, god father would definitely believe his words.

The expressions of the four patriarchs turned dark, and a divine presence erupted from their bodies as if they were planning to kill Chen Xiu right in front of the gate to Asura City. After all, if they allowed him to meet with Asura with the fifteen gods in his hand, the four clans would be in a crisis.

He might not say anything while the battle of the gods raged on around them, but if he won, the four clans wouldn’t have a good ending.

Because of that, it would be better to just kill Chen Xiu at the city gate. After deciding on that, the patriarchs looked at each other, and divine power bubbled out from their hands.

Suddenly though, an ancient god’s presence erupted from the depths of Asura City, and the four patriarchs pulled back their divine presence. A hint of fear appeared in their eyes as they sighed.

The five ancient gods and Lakshmi City’s goddess had appeared, so Asura sensed them and came out of seclusion. This took away the last chance the four had to kill Chen Xiu.

The next instant, a figure appeared between Li Yunmu and the four clan patriarchs. Asura looked at them and the sixty gods behind them with a dark expression.

“What exactly is going on here!”

After seeing Chen Xiu alone, Asura had a good guess of what had transpired. Using the chance of him being in seclusion, the four clans had really taken action.

Asura had promoted the branch descendant and given him control of Asura City as well as the four clans, but once he came out, he saw the four clan patriarchs and sixty gods standing in front of Li Yunmu. Wasn’t it obvious then that they were thinking of using the opportunity of their god father being in seclusion to kill the person he had promoted?

So much for the four clans being cautious…

The clan patriarchs became terrified and knelt on the ground before respectfully saying, “Respected greetings, god father.”

The sixty gods also knelt on the ground and respectfully kowtowed.

Li Yunmu looked at Asura then and said in a calm voice, “God father came out of seclusion… The patriarchs of the four clans came here just a moment ago when we felt an enormous amount of divine presence near Asura City.”

The moment he said that, the four clan patriarchs were startled and looked up with suspicion in their hearts.

Asura turned around to look at Li Yunmu and asked with a frown, “Really?”

Asura didn’t really believe Li Yunmu’s words. If they had sensed the formidable divine presence outside Asura City, the four clan patriarchs could have come out. The gods of all clans could also take action upon noticing such a thing. It wasn’t out of the realm of possibility.

But as it happened, only sixty gods had come. If they weren’t present to deal with Li Yunmu, then what else were they doing here in such numbers?

But Asura didn’t expect that before the four patriarchs could make an explanation, Li Yunmu would help them out.

That wasn’t a good sign. He had chosen Chen Xiu to strengthen the branch family descendants in order to restrain the direct descendants. If both sides joined together, his actions would have been meaningless.

Patriarch Doro lowered his head and followed Li Yunmu’s words. “Yes, god father. We four sensed the appearance of divine presence outside Asura City and we brought some clan elders to investigate.”

Although he didn’t know what kind of ghost had come to possess Chen Xiu, it didn’t matter at that moment. If with Asura present in front of him Chen Xiu didn’t reveal the matter which could shake the four clans and even helped them exonerate themselves, he would naturally follow him.

Li Yunmu saw the suspicious gaze which Asura had cast toward him and said in a flat voice, “Really, god father.”

He knew that Asura would be suspicious if he helped the four clans exonerate themselves and would even begin to wonder whether he was collaborating with the four clans or not, but Li Yunmu couldn’t be bothered about it right then.

The main forces of the five ancient gods and Lakshmi City had already arrived before Asura City, so the battle of gods would definitely start in a few moments.

Once it began, Asura and the five ancient gods would die, so there was no need for him to pay any attention to it.

“All right.”

Asura’s expression was completely calm when he shifted his gaze toward the divine presences outside Asura City. His face was completely blank.

He could sense that the main forces had arrived at Asura City, but what he couldn’t understand was the reason behind the collaboration of the five ancient gods and Laksmi City as well as their timing. Asura had thought that he knew the thoughts of the five ancient gods when he had killed the ancestors and they left after being intimidated.

Based on the personalities of the five ancient gods, they should be in the divine palace right then, recuperating by using the Heavenly Grand Ritual. Only when their injuries recovered should they take any action.

Asura knew what the five ancient gods would do, so he had entered seclusion with his heart at ease. He had anticipated that the battle of gods would only begin after ten years. But only a few days had passed, and the five ancient gods changed their mind and decided to collaborate with Lakshmi City to declare war on Asura City.

After examining the gods arrayed before his city, Asura’s expression grew dark. Given the presence of such a large army, it was clear that the battle was about to start. The five gods were obviously in collusion with Lakshmi City and had dispatched the majority of their gods, but why?

If it was said that the five ancient gods had taken action for Ancient Goddess Lakshmi, Asura would not believe it.

Lanlou was different from other regions where the gods were still bound by their emotions. Although the seven gods of Lanlou were born together, there were no sentiments among the seven of them.

Before the power of belief was discovered, the seven ancient gods had lived harmoniously like brothers and sisters, but after the first battle of gods, the seven ancient gods began to guard against each other.

“I will go and see what exactly is going on. You all return and gather all the gods. If the negotiation fails, the battle of gods will start.”

Asura took a step forward and disappeared. When he reappeared, he was already standing in front of the huge army.

The clan patriarchs rose up from the ground and looked at Li Yunmu’s smiling face with cold snorts.

Patriarch Rahu then disdainfully said, “Don’t think that you can curry favor with us just because you exonerated us.”

chapters.title: Chapter 918 - Shifting Attention
chapters.body:
Chapter 918 - Shifting Attention

Chapter 918: Shifting Attention

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu shrugged his shoulders and looked at the clan patriarchs. “I fear that you are thinking too much. The reason why I helped you make excuses in front of god father wasn’t in order to curry favor with you all and resolve the hatred between us. I just don’t like other people taking action on my behalf. I like settling things myself.”

“Ha ha ha ha, sixth ancestor is really confident. You even dare to be so arrogant in front of our four clans. If you didn’t rely on god father, you would been crushed under our feet like an ant long ago. This lowly servant will wait to see how exactly the sixth ancestor will deal with the four clans without relying on god father,” Deva Clan’s matriarch said with a sneer.

After she finished speaking, the four patriarchs walked into Asura City to return to their residences and gather the gods of their clan.

Li Yunmu unhurriedly walked to the lower city and the colosseum in the middle of it. In just a short few days, all the houses of the lower city had been torn down. The destruction had even spread to the middle city. The houses near the gate were all gone.

When Li Yunmu reached the colosseum, two figures appeared in front of him and respectfully said, “Lord has returned! Did the four clans create any difficulties for lord during the trip to the resource land?”

Rat and Old Bastard raised their heads with excited expressions. When Li Yunmu saw the two of them, a smile appeared at the corners of his lips, and he slowly said, “I’ve returned. Stand up now and let’s go inside before talking.”

Li Yunmu advanced toward the colosseum while saying that, Old Bastard and Rat respectfully followed behind him. After entering the colosseum, Madam and Do Mingyan came over from outside.

Upon seeing Li Yunmu, they happily rushed over and knelt on the ground.

“Lord, you finally returned.”

Li Yunmu nodded and saw that their cultivation base was no longer at half god step, but rather at god realm. Rat had bestowed power of belief to the two of them, which showed that they were reliable.

After coming to the conference room, Li Yunmu sat down on the main seat. He looked at the four people underneath and thought deeply. The battle of gods was about to start, and the Ground Clan as well as Rat and the other three belonged to Asura Clan, so they might not follow him in what he planned to do. After all, when the four of them joined Li Yunmu, it was because he was impersonating Chen Xiu, who was someone from Asura Clan.

If the four of them learned of Li Yunmu’s true identity, they might not agree to follow him.

After a moment of silence, Li Yunmu’s figure flickered and revealed his original appearance. When the four people underneath saw it, their eyes went wide, and divine presence erupted from their bodies.

“Who are you! Why are you impersonating our lord!” Rat shouted out first.

“Be relieved, I am your lord. But previously, I was using Chen Xiu’s identity to infiltrate Asura City. Now though, I want you see my true identity, because I want to ask you whether you want to follow me or not.”

The moment he said that, Rat and the other three fell silent. They watched Li Yunmu without saying a word.

“I am not someone from Asura City or even Lanlou. I came to Asura City to get something. Right now, I have obtained that thing, which only leaves behind a final matter, and after that I will leave Lanlou. Thus I want to ask you all now, do you want to follow me or will you stay behind?

“If you wish to remain, then after I go, Ground Clan’s matters will be left to the four of you. If you agree to follow me, perhaps you may encounter a lot of danger in the future.”

After Li Yunmu finished speaking, he calmly waited for Rat and others to make their choice. If they wanted to stay behind, then he would hand over the Ground Clan for them to manage. After all, they were gods so it could be considered as a good arrangement.

If they followed him, however, the four of them would have to start cultivating from the beginning after he took away power of belief.

After a long time, Rat, who stood in the front, looked at Li Yunmu and suspiciously asked, “Lord, are you really our lord?”

“Naturally!”

After hearing that, a smile appeared on Rat’s face as he knelt on the ground, and he said with excitement, “Wherever lord goes, I will follow. Back then, I was constantly fighting for my life, but lord saved me, so naturally this life belongs to lord.”

“Me too, me too,” Old Bastard shouted out while excitedly waving the hatchet in his hand.

Li Yunmu nodded in satisfaction, then looked at Madam and Do Mingyan. Neither of them hesitated. They lowered their heads and said with a smile, “Wherever lord goes, we will follow.”

“Since this is the case, then you four should summon the descendants of Ground Clan. Once the battle of gods starts, they will only be used as cannon fodder. At that time, when the battle starts, you four will follow me,” Li Yunmu said.

The four people flickered and disappeared from the room. Li Yunmu then stood up and walked to the window, where he looked in the direction of lower city and mumbled, “Where is beyond the heavens hiding?”

Once the battle of gods started, Li Yunmu wouldn’t need to pay any attention to Asura. Even if Asura was a quasi master god, he would be restrained after running into five ancient gods who would be doing their utmost and Brunhilda whose strength was at the peak of ancient god realm.

Right then, there was only one matter left in front of Li Yunmu, and it was to find the people from beyond the heavens hiding in Asura City.

When the seals of master gods were removed, ways to enter the Origin World appeared. The powers from beyond the heavens guarding outside then dispatched people to infiltrate the Origin World.

Li Yunmu thus wanted to eradicate them one by one, so as to avoid the gods of the Origin World collaborating with them for benefits or to save their lives.

[What do you intend to do? Want to eradicate the people from beyond the heavens one by one?] the system asked in his mind.

“What about it? If beyond the heavens spread through the Origin World, who knows how many gods will secretly join them. If I hadn’t gone to the divine palace for Heavenly Grand Ritual, I fear that even I wouldn’t have discovered an enemy like beyond the heavens in the Origin World,” Li Yunmu said in a calm voice.

After a moment of silence, the system said, [When the seals are opened, the flaws in the Origin World’s seal will appear. As long as the leaks exist, even if you eradicate those who have infiltrated from beyond the heavens, another wave of people will be sent by beyond the heavens. They’ll come in a steady flow.

[That’s why rather than going through the trouble of eradicating the infiltrators, it would be better to strike at the source,] the system said without a hurry.

Source?

Li Yunmu wrinkled his eyebrows and asked, “You mean to say that I should open the seal, allowing master gods to come out? And revealing the Origin World in front of beyond the heavens? Doing that would indeed protect us from gods secretly colluding with beyond the heavens, but once the Origin World is revealed, we won’t be able to defeat beyond the heavens with the Origin Worls’ current strength?”

[Do you really think that a True God is just a decoration?] the system asked with a dark look.

Li Yunmu laughed but didn’t reply. The system was indeed a true god, but beyond the heavens had at least ten quasi true gods as well as a true god. How could one person stop such a magnificent lineup?

There was no way Li Yunmu could listen to the system’s words and continue removing the seals.

chapters.title: Chapter 920 - Responsibility
chapters.body:
Chapter 920 - Responsibility

Chapter 920: Responsibility

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

While the four clans were choosing elders and summoning their descendant, Li Yunmu was standing on a high platform in the colosseum. Rat and other three gods were standing behind him while the Ground Clan’s descendants were underneath. The difference from before was that each and every one of the Ground Clan’s descendants was wearing proper clothes with a lively gaze.

Less than a few days after the Ground Clan was established, Li Yunmu had left after sharing all the future plans with Rat. Madam, who was in charge of the spinning and weaving unit, then summoned the women of Ground Clan to choose a few with dexterous hands and started getting clothes knitted day and night. Other people were chosen for construction and forging metal.

The enthusiasm in the Ground Clan ran high, and everyone worked against the clock to collect credit points and exchange them for martial arts. Some of the Ground Clan’s brightest descendants then advanced to flux experts.

Such a great transformation could only happen because of the sixth ancestor standing on the platform.

“Today, I ask everyone to leave their work and come to the colosseum. I have to announce something. This matter concerns your future as well as mine—”

Before Li Yunmu could finish, a loud sound rang, and the entire colosseum shook. The Ground Clan’s descendants looked around in confusion, not knowing what was happening. Li Yunmu paused for a moment to look at the sky above, then turned back to the crowd below.

“What you all sensed just now is related to what I wanted to say.

“I’m not someone from Lanlou and I’m not from Asura City. I only came here to obtain something. That matter is finished now, and the loud sound from just a moment ago tells that Asura and the five ancient gods have begun fighting. The second battle of gods has started. Therefore, I want to ask you all, whether you want to follow me or remain in Asura City.”

After he said this, the Ground Clan’s descendants standing underneath with confusion on their faces were startled. The sixth ancestor’s words were extremely unexpected, and they were unable to understand them for a moment.

Once they grasped what was being said though, they began to discuss whether to stay in Asura City where they had been living their whole life or follow the sixth ancestor who has given them another life.

Li Yunmu waited calmly. The matter of moving was difficult to comprehend for the descendants of Ground Clan in a short time.

Once they discussed the matter, they raised their heads to look at Li Yunmu and spoke in unison. “Regardless of you are, whether you are from Asura City or not, you gave us a new life. You are our lord ancestor, so wherever you go, we will follow.”

Their crisp and resonant voices reverberated through the colosseum.

“Good, good, good.”

Li Yunmu felt a great amount of responsibility after hearing the clear voice of Ground Clan’s descendants. Back when he had saved his Earth, he had the mentality of saving his own family and that was it. Right now, however, the Ground Clan’s descendants put their complete trust in him, which made him want to bring them to Earth.

Li Yunmu extended his hand, and it stretched like a snake toward the colosseum stage. It then enlarged to the size of a small mountain. A small crack was in his palm. It pulled apart and formed a huge gate.

“Enter the heavenly world and wait until I bring you to your new home.”

When he said that, all the disciples of Ground Clan entered the heavenly world. After a long time, when the final person went inside, Li Yunmu pulled back his palm.

Rat arrived then and looked at Li Yunmu. “Lord, what to do now?”

“Go outside Asura City,”Li Yunmu said and leaped into the sky.

Rat and the other three followed behind. They turned into rays of light flying outside Asura City.

When they arrived outside Asura City, the four clan patriarchs as well as many elders were standing at the gate and looking at the battle of the ancestors in midair with dignified expressions. Li Yunmu led Rat and the other three to the front. He stopped side by side with the four clan patriarchs and Ashbi.

“I believe the Ground Clan has many people. It is that which has taken so much of the sixth ancestor’s time, so he could only hurry over now.”

Patriarch Doro looked from the corner of eye, and a hint of ridicule appeared in his twelve eyes.

“Ground Clan has been established recently, so having four gods is already very good.”

“Sixth ancestor, after the battle of ancient gods, the gods of both sides will enter a chaotic melee. I will remind you out of kindness that you should not run around wildly at that time. If the four gods of the Ground Clan die during the chaos of war, it will be extremely ufnortunate.”

The four clan patriarchs originally had worried expressions, but when they saw Li Yunmu and the other four arrive, they couldn’t help but mock him.

Li Yunmu stood at Ashbi’s side with a wooden expression. Rat and the other three behind him, however, looked at the four clan patriarchs with cold eyes and sneers on their faces.

“You all heard the warning of the clan patriarchs. When the chaotic battle begins, you must take advantage of the chaos to survive. After all, the Ground Clan has only four gods. If you die, it would be extremely unfortunate,” Li Yunmu said with a faint smile.

The four clan patriarchs snorted, but didn’t say anymore. Everyone’s gaze turned toward the distorted brilliance in the sky. In the Origin World whose master gods were sealed, the ancient gods were the most formidable existences. Among the seven figures struggling in the sky, each was a peak existence.

The seven ancient gods used divine techniques filled with magnificent divine power one after another, and the space around them distorted. It cracked from the constant barrage of divine techniques being thrown around. The brilliant light was also enough to blind the eyes of gods standing underneath, so they were unable to see how the battle was proceeding.

If any of divine techniques fell down, they could instantly kill the god on which they landed.

A ripple appeared where the ancient gods were fighting and spread in all directions. Wherever it went, the surrounding clouds disappeared, and countless cracks appeared in space. It seemed like it was about to shatter into pieces.

A black shadow flew out from the radiance, but it stopped after retreating a few meters. Once the divine techniques disappeared, the lights faded away, and six ancient gods became visible.

A trail of blood was at the corner of Asura’s lips. His hair had come undone, and there were cracks on his golden armour. He cut a sorry figure.

The ancient gods and Brunhilda standing not far away from him were in perfect condition. They were still in their peak state.

In the first clash, Asura had lost by a little.

Among the five ancient gods, Vishnu’s figure was fluctuating constantly. Sometimes he would turn into a young girl sitting on an enormous tiger, while at other times, he transformed into a god wearing golden armor and emitting golden light. Regardless of which shape he took though, a cold smile remained at the corner of his lips.

“Asura, you had indeed concealed yourself deeply,” he said with ridicule in his voice. “Six ancient gods jointly attacked you, but you still stopped them with only light injuries. It seems that if we hadn’t come to fight you and allowed you to develop, I am afraid that we would have been swallowed by you in the end.”

Asura sneered, then looked at Vishnu. Soon after, his gaze flitted past the other four gods and he calmly said, “Since you’ve learned of my strength, retreat now. I will give you ten years to recover from your injuries.”

chapters.title: Chapter 923 - Immortal Land
chapters.body:
Chapter 923 - Immortal Land

While standing on the cliff, Li Yunmu could see a jungle underneath as far as his eye could see. There was a thick layer of clouds before him, extending like an ocean into the distance. Not far away, a few red-crowned cranes were flying with people riding on their backs. When Li Yunmu looked around, the figures sitting on the red-crowned cranes also sensed his existence.

The red-crowned cranes, which were originally flying toward the west, changed direction and aimed for the cliff. In the blink of an eye, a small group of red-crowned cranes descended on the ground. A few young taoists leapt down from them. They all had swords on their backs.

A youth who acted as their leader carefully observed Li Yunmu and suspiciously asked with a frown, “Are you someone from Asura Clan?”

“Do you know the appearance of Asura Clan’s people?”

Li Yunmu sized up the young taoist. The presence coming from the youth’s body was only at half god realm, while the taoists behind him only had a cultivation base of initial stage sage flux expert, so Li Yunmu couldn’t help but feel somewhat curious. Yin son of heaven and his subordinate black-robed person whom he had seen in divine palace were in god realm.

That was why he believed that god realm was the lowest standard for people sent by beyond the heavens through the leaks into the Origin World. He was thus surprised to see a half god expert as well as sage flux experts in the small world.

With such low strength, weren’t they afraid of courting death after entering the Origin World? Speaking about cooperation also required some strength, so they had to at least be gods.

“I have seen people of Asura Clan, and all of them have different anomalies. Unlike them, you have the appearance of an ordinary person, so you shouldn’t be an Asura clansman. But if you aren’t from the Asura Clan, how could you enter this small world?”

A hint of doubt appeared on the young taoist’s face as he questioned again and again.

After hearing his words, the expression of the female taoist standing behind the youth became flustered.

She stretched her slim white hand to pull the young taoist’s clothes and softly said, “Senior apprentice brother, you have said too much. This isn’t Profound Sword Pavilion, and we might encounter some mishap if you continue talking irresponsibly. This person of unknown origins, if he is a spy of the Origin World, then we might even be killed by him.”

The young man felt enlightened by her words, and he said while raising his guard, “Oh, correct. This dao friend, if you don’t have anything to do here, then leave this small world of the night pearl. The people of the Origin World aren’t allowed to step foot into this region. If you were discovered by the Alliance, you will be killed until even your soul is gone.”

A hint of fierceness appeared in the young taoist’s eyes then, and the expressions of junior taoists standing behind him turned dull.

Li Yunmu looked at them and the red-crowned cranes, and he felt rather happy in his heart. He hadn’t expected that there would be such a pure person in beyond the heavens. He still kindly warned Li Yunmu even after knowing that he was someone from the Origin World.

“Don’t panic, there’s no one in this small world who can be my opponent,” Li Yunmu said, and his body erupted with god level presence, intimidating the taoists so much that they retreated backwards and the red-crowned cranes kneeling on the ground became restless.

The young taoist looked at Li Yunmu’s young face and said in panic, “True Immortal!”

Li Yunmu looked at the expressions of the taoists, and a smile appeared at the corner of his lips. “What’s your name? Which power from beyond the heavens is this small world affiliated to? Also, how did you all find out that I am a person of the Origin World?”

The young taoist snapped to attention and looked at Li Yunmu in a panic. “My name is Jue Qingji, and the ones standing behind me are my junior apprentice brothers and sisters. This small world isn’t affiliated to any power, but rather belongs to the Alliance. As for how we could recognize that you are someone from the Origin World, it is because the cultivation system of people in the Origin World is different from ours, so we can differentiate with one glance.”

After saying that, Jue Qingzi sensed someone pulling his clothes from behind, and he turned to see the female taoist with a pale expression. All of a sudden, he realized his mistake. He was someone from beyond the heavens, but he was telling all the important matters to someone from the Origin World, which was clearly too much.

After his words, Li Yunmu realized that people from beyond the heavens relied on the difference in presence to check whether someone was from the Origin World or not and didn’t base it on appearance.

Yet except for the gods of the Origin World, the majority of other people had some sort of anomaly that would give them away as people of the Origin World at first glance. After all, the people from beyond the heavens that Li Yunmu had seen so far had normal appearances.

They were quite similar to people of Earth.

Hold on…

After thinking that far, a sudden flash of enlightenment appeared in Li Yunmu’s mind as he realized something. The people of Earth didn’t have any anomalies, the same as people from beyond the heavens.

On top of that, Earth was the other path which True God was experimenting with. On Earth, its people weren’t suppressed by gods. Everyone cultivated to defy the heavens, and True God had done it so in order to experiment with whether they could rely on themselves to obtain godhood.

Were the people of Earth created using beyond the heavens as a basis?

Jue Qingzi and the other people from beyond the heavens were still present, so it wasn’t a good time for Li Yunmuto ask the system about it. That meant that he could only suppress his suspicion and enquire about it later.

Li Yunmu then raised his head to look at Jue Qingzi and said with a smile, “Brother Jue Qingzi, the words of your junior apprentice sister are correct. I am indeed a spy dispatched by the Origin World, and I have come to learn about beyond the heavens. I wonder then if you could explain some things to me?”

When he said that, the Jue Qingzi turned pale, but he didn’t say anything.

The expression of the female taoist hiding behind him changed at that moment, and she growled, “See senior apprentice brother, what was I saying? This guy has come to investigate the Alliance! Yet just a moment ago, you told him too much! That was wrong! We should’ve left without showing any consideration!”

After a moment of silence, Jue Qingzi lightly coughed, and a hint of regret appeared in his eyes.

“Lord has the strength of a true immortal, so you should find the people on the same level to obtain information from instead of people like us who haven’t become immortal yet!” he said slowly. “Our strength is weak, so I don’t know how much we can tell you!”

Li Yunm shook his head, and the presence he released from his body became even more profound. Jue Qingzi’s eyes went wide as he felt his head swaying. The entire world in his eyes seemed to have turned upside down.

Before, it was true immortal realm, but now he had erupted with the presence of a golden immortal realm.

Only the sect master of Jue Qingzi’s sect was a golden immortal.Yet the person of the Origin World which he encountered was surprisingly an almighty who could casually flick him to death.

If he revealed information about beyond the heavens to this almighty and it became known by the Alliance, he would certainly be executed, and even his sect would be implicated.

But if he didn’t speak, then he and those around him would face death right away.

Jue Qingzi’s voice was shaking when he said with a stammer, “Dao friend, if I don’t speak, then will you kill us fellow disciples?”

“Naturally no. Am I someone like people from beyond the heavens who treat people of the Origin World with incomparable cruelty? But although I am kind, I would have to make you all suffer a little in order to learn about the matters of beyond the heavens,” Li Yunmu said with a smile.

Originally, when he just encountered the people from beyond the heavens in this small world, he wanted to completely erase them. But the ones he met were so hilarious and kind that he could not do it.

He had a good opinion of Jue Qingzi and his fellow disciples, so he naturally wouldn’t kill them.

chapters.title: Chapter 924 - Good Friend
chapters.body:
Chapter 924 - Good Friend

Jue Qingzi’s complexion turned deathly pale after he heard Li Yunmu’s words. In his heart, he was berating himself for running off to the cliff to meddle in other people’s affairs.

When the female taoist behind him thought about dying, her heart filled with grief and indignation. But it was good that the sect’s safety could be maintained with the sacrifice of a few lives.

When Li Yunmu finished speaking though, her face that still had baby fat became somewhat ugly as she thought about all sorts of methods used for torturing people.

After a moment of silence, she shouted loudly to Li Yunmu, “I will speak! I will speak! Even if senior apprentice brother doesn’t speak, I will speak. Lord, you cannot torture me!”

“…” Li Yunmu.

“…” Jue Qingzi.

“You are really a… tactful person!”

Li Yunmu originally wanted to use the words ‘timid and cowardly’, but he stopped himself midway and changed them with words which wouldn’t hurt others.

Jue Qingzi looked at the female taoist and regretfully sighed. He then turned to Li Yunmu and slowly said, “What does lord want to know? I will explain as much as I can.”

Li Yunmu glanced at Jue Qingzi as well as the girl, then said with a smile, “Where were you all preparing to go just now?”

“We were going to the ruins to attend the trials. People like us come to the night pearl’s small world through the Alliance in order to participate in the trials. There are remnants of gods in the ruins, including their godhood, which can allow us to comprehend the laws of a great dao,” the young girl explained excitedly.

Remnants of gods? Godhood?

A small world was a transformed world fragment, and the night pearl was a small world refined by the alliance. Since it was from beyond the heavens, their path of cultivation was different, so where did the remnants of gods come from? And they even had hiding godhood among them. Even if in the Origin World there were countless gods, there were no so-called remnants of gods, and godhood was very rare.

Previously, gods required godhood to advance to god realm, but power of belief came after that and created a shortcut, which made godhood no longer necessary to become a god.

As luck would have it, just when Li Yunmu arrived, he ran into the talkative Jue Qingzi and a female taoist afraid of torture. The so-called god remnants were also open, so it was quite likely that the area around them would be very lively.

As for the outside world, the battle between ancient gods wouldn’t conclude so quickly. He still had quite a bit of time to understand beyond the heavens from Jue Qingzi.

“Since this is the case, then I will follow you to take a trip to the god’s remnants.”

After saying that, Li Yunmu’s figure flickered, and he saw down on the back of a red-crowned crane, alongside Jue Qingzi. The man sighed again, then patted his red-crowned crane to start flying.

While they were rushing to the god’s remnants, Li Yunmu enquired about the matters of beyond the heavens. He asked about the sects, the Alliance, and even the distribution of power. Jue Qingzi told him everything without trying to hide anything. Due to that, apart from some secrets, Li Yunmu also gained a rough understanding of the structure of beyond the heavens.

Previously he had only known about some things from the mouth of yin son of heaven, but after Jue QIngzi explained things to him, he could be considered to have learned quite a lot.

Beyond the heavens weren’t called beyond the heavens by its own people. Apparently it was only a name given by the system. Jue Qingzi’s world was also a part of the universe, but according to him, it was known as Goumang Real World.

Regardless of whether it was the Origin World or the Goumang Real World, both of them were worlds among the ten thousand worlds. Or perhaps it would be better to say that they were one of the previous ten thousand worlds.

In the ancient times, when the ten thousand worlds were flourishing, every world had a ruler who was known as world master. The world master’s status was similar to that of the master of a heavenly world in their heavenly world. They were the creator gods.

Afterwards, the ten thousand worlds encountered a disaster, and the majority of the worlds perished or died. The remaining worlds scattered and began to drift in the void. They had no contact between them until ten thousand years ago, the Origin World and Goumang Real World encountered each other while floating and began to battle for territory.

In that year, the emperor monarchs forming the main part of offensive force were the peak power in the Goumang Real World. Each emperor monarch possessed the strength of Great Principal Golden Immortal, which was equivalent to master god in the Origin World. However, the majority of emperor monarchs of Goumang Real World perished. Only a few of them advanced to quasi sage realm, which was equivalent to half true god.

As for the Alliance, it was came to be when the small powers in the Goumang Real World united. During ordinary times, the small powers like sects acted independently, but if something changed, the Alliance would pick out a small number of people from the factions of the five quasi sages.

Jue Qingzi’s Profound Sword Pavilion was one of the members of the Alliance.

Jue Qingzi had come on the trip in order to fight for godhood and to comprehend the laws of great dao. After that, he could pass the tribulation and become an immortal.

The young girl and the two behind her had come to broaden their horizons. The young girl was the daughter of Profound Sword Sect’s sect master, and her name was Yan Wanqiu, while the twins behind her were Tong Dongdong and Dong Tongtong.

While the red-crowned cranes flew through the sky, a sea of clouds floated under them, and wisps of red clouds appeared in the western direction, which created quite a celestial scenery.

When Li Yunmu heard the name of the twins, he couldn’t help but burst out laughing. “These two names are really easy to remember and also quite novel. Oh right, brother, since you have already dispelled a part of my doubts, you can help me dispel the rest of them too.”

“The rest too?” Jue Qingzi asked with a frown. He had already told Li Yunmu all about beyond the heavens, so what other doubt could he still have?

“I have a good understanding about the strength of Goumang Real World now, and the two of us have also become good friends. So, since we are good friends, can you tell me about the cultivation system of your Goumang Real World?”

Before Li Yunmu could even finish speaking, Jue Qingzi’s expression changed, and a formidable power erupted from his body. That power was hidden in his body like a bomb, and the moment it was ignited, his body would destroy itself while his soul would scatter.

“Brother, you shouldn’t think that just because you are a Great Principal Golden Immortal, I will surrender and tell everything about beyond the heavens to you. Even if I am kind-hearted and wouldn’t attack the people of the Origin World, I’m not a traitor. If you try to force the cultivation methods of Goumang Origin World out of me, I will detonate my yuanying!”

Li Yunmu looked at the determined Jue Qingzi with a bit of surprise. He hadn’t thought that if he asked Jue Qingzi about the cultivation system of beyond the heavens, Yue Qingzi would react like this.

It seemed like he had underestimated Jue Qingzi previously. However, he really needed the cultivation method of Goumang Real World. After all, if he had it, the system in his brain could analyze it and find hidden flaws.

It could be said that as long as he got his hands on the cultivation system, the threat posed by Goumang Real World would greatly decrease.

A chicken leg appeared out of nowhere in the hands of Yan Wanqiu flying behind him, and she threw it in her mouth while looking at Jue Qingzi with eyes wide with surprise.

“I hadn’t expected that senior apprentice brother would show such courage at this time. It truly caught me off guard.”

Jue Qingzi’s expression changed, and he said with a smile, “That is only natural. What kind of character do you think your elder brother has?”

Yan Wanqiu rolled her large eyes and said, “What use is your courage? Aren’t you still bullied by those who are stronger than you? It has been so long since we came to this small world, but you still haven’t managed to snatch even one godhood. No, what’s this talk about snatching, we haven’t even seen one!”

chapters.title: Chapter 925 - Condition
chapters.body:
Chapter 925 - Condition

Chapter 925: Condition

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The sudden words caused the smile on Jue Qingzi’s face to freeze. His expression changed, and the corner of his mouth began to twitch. He looked at Yan Wanqiu holding a chicken leg and felt rather disappointed in his heart.

He had never thought that the apprentice sister on whom he doted so much would surprisingly drop such a slap on his face in front of others. Soon though, the disappointment in his heart turned to despair.

Even after staying in this small world for so many years, he wasn’t able to contest for godhood. When he came, he was at late stage of passing tribulation, and now he was still at the late stage of passing tribulation. His cultivation hadn’t advanced in the least, so all the time had passed in vain. When Jue Qingzhi thought about it, he sighed.

“Junior apprentice sister you won’t understand,” he said with regret in his voice. “There’s a saying that sometimes insisting on obtaining something is useless and one should let nature take its course. Master also once said—”

“Father said that cultivation is the path of defying the heavens. What we need, we must obtain it at any cost. If we don’t have something, we should snatch it from others. Otherwise, we will end up becoming martyrs.”

Yan Wanqiu nibbled on the chicken leg with an expression of satisfaction on her face, but her eyes were looking at her senior brother with firmness.

Li Yunmu listened to the conversation between the disciples in front of him with a smile on his face. Suddenly a thought flashed in his mind, and he looked at Jue Qingzi.

“Brother, if you want to obtain godhood, I can help you contest for it. But you should know that there’s a price for it. After all, there’s no free lunch in this world. If you want something, you must be ready to give something up.”

The moment he said that, Jue Qingzi’s expression changed, and a powerful presence erupted from his body.

“Like I said…”

Yan Wanqiu saw that Jue Qingzi was about to repeat his words again, and she threw away the chicken bone. She then turned to Li Yunmu and sincerely asked, “If I speak, can you help me become an immortal?”

Li Yunmu looked at Yan Wanqiu and earnestly replied, “If you speak, I swear to help you become an immortal. Even if you cannot become an immortal, I will definitely make you a god.”

He wasn’t lying. Although he wasn’t clear about Goumang Real World’s cultivation system, he could still guess that the so-called late stage passing tribulation which Jue Qingzi was stuck in should be the half god stage of the Origin World.

Previously, when he revealed his god level presence, Jue Qingzi had blurted out that he was a true immortal, which indicated that true immortal should be equivalent to god realm. And if Yan Wanqiu would really explain the cultivation secrets of Goumang Real World, he would naturally help her become an immortal.

But if he could not do it, he could still take out a godhood from the Origin World to help her become a god.

“Junior apprentice sister… this a traitorous act, you know that, right?” Jue Qingzi shouted out in anger.

His voice was so loud that even the red immortal cranes became somewhat unsettled. Dong Tongtong and Tong Dongdong sitting at the back, revealed alarmed expressions, and they desperately grabbed the feathers of the red-crowned cranes so that they would not fall down.

Yan Wanqiu pulled her hair back without paying any attention and disdainfully said, “Senior apprentice brother, from the time you told him about Goumang Origin World, you become a traitor. Furthermore, why can other powers collaborate with the gods of the Origin World, but we can’t?

“You shouldn’t believe that the Alliance is sacred, or you will harm yourself. Look at your own situation. Once others say it is for the Alliance, you who should contest for godhood instead help them in obtaining it. Apart from a single line of gratitude, what else have you ever received?”

The girl’s words were like nails, and when Jue Qingzi heard them, he felt a hole opening up in his heart, and it was very painful. But although the words hurt, they were indeed the truth.

For many years, he had been acting as a helper for others. Could it be then that it was for this reason that his junior apprentice sister, who previously adored him greatly, began to avoid him?

Jue Qingzi lowered his head and began to contemplate.

Yan Wanqiu looked at Jue Qingzi’s actions and slightly shook her head. She then shifted her gaze to Li Yunmu and said, “Since you have agreed to my request, I will tell you about the cultivation of Goumang Real World. But I have one more condition!”

“Speak.”

Li Yunmu’s gaze flickered as if he had sensed something.

“As a condition of exchange, you must assist my senior apprentice brother in obtaining a godhood in the remnant of gods. I had checked, and it has the metal attribute which is most suitable to our cultivation. On top of that, you must also tell us about the cultivation methods of the Origin World.”

A calm expression was on Yan Wanqiu’s plump face as she bluntly put her requests forward.

Li Yunmu could help snatch the godhood, but why did she need to understand the secrets of the cultivation methods of the Origin World. He had thought that the people of Goumang Real World had obtained them as well as martial and divine skills of the Origin World a long time ago. After all, Jue Qingzi said that he could sense the difference between the people of the two worlds.

Li Yunmu didn’t know how cultivation worked in Goumang Real World and couldn’t distinguish between the people of the two worlds. The reason why when he encountered the yin son of heaven, the man had said nothing like that was because he considered Li Yunmu a god of the divine palace.

Although there were three thousand grand daos, the cultivation methods of the Origin World and Goumang Real World were completely different. Without the other party’s cultivation methods, no one could properly distinguish the difference in the presence of the two worlds.

“I agree to both conditions. But before that, I want to ask something, didn’t the Goumang Real World acquire the cultivation method of the Origin World a long time ago? Then why do you still want it?” Li Yunmu asked suspiciously.

Jue Qingzi was sitting like a sculpture on the red-crowned crane, completely lifeless. The twins also kept their mouths shut while firmly holding onto the feathers of the red-crowned cranes with both hands. They were earnestly listening to the conversation between the two parties.

“Goumang Real World possesses it, but that doesn’t mean that our Profound Sword Pavilion also possesses it. In the Alliance, Profound Sword Pavilion is one of the weakest members without any authority to speak. We all came to this small world together with the senior apprentice brother to gain experience, but we could only do so because my father spent a large amount of resources to send us here.”

“You want the cultivation secrets of the Goumang Origin World not only to understand them, right? The cultivation methods of Goumang Real World are different from your cultivation. If you get familiar with the cultivation methods and skills of Goumang Real World, naturally it will help you advance,” Yan Wanqiu solemnly said while taking a bite out of the chicken rib in her hand.

“En, I agree with you. So tell me about the cultivation of Goumang Real World.”

Li Yunmu nodded, and the system hidden until then also appeared in his mind to listen.

Back in the day, the system had been the True God. It wasn’t that he had never captured anyone from Goumang Real World to steal the cultivation methods and skills of Goumang Real World, but whenever he mentioned the words like cultivation methods or secrets, the captives of Goumang Real World would instantly turn into ashes. Not even their soul would be left after that.

This certainly took care of anyone who wanted to speak, and the important secrets were not leaked out. The other side had used this sort of ruthless method to ensure their superiority, and it was very effective.

There was balance for a time, but afterwards, some of the Origin World gods were enticed and collaborated with the emperor monarchs. They used cultivation methods to exchange for the opportunity to advance.

chapters.title: Chapter 926 - Three Calamities And Nine Tribulations
chapters.body:
Chapter 926 - Three Calamities And Nine Tribulations

Chapter 926: Three Calamities and Nine Tribulations

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Because of that, the cultivation methods as well as secrets of the Origin World became known by the emperor monarchs of Goumang Real World. After learning about the flaws of the Origin World’s cultivation methods, their strength increased by leaps and bounds, and the five quasi sage level experts appeared.

After Li Yunmu obtained the cultivation method of Goumang Real World from Yan Wanqiu, the system could analyze the merits and demerits of it and improve the entire cultivation system of the Origin World.

“Then I will begin. The Origin World walks the path of practicing martial arts, in other words, close quarters combat. It could also be said that you mainly focus on cultivating the body. As for the laws of grand dao, you use godhood to attain the god realm.

“The merits of possessing a tyrannical fleshly body as well as not needing to comprehend grand dao are that you can reach the god realm much easier. The weakness, however, is that you are unable to sense the grand dao, so every step after becoming a god becomes much more difficult!”

Li Yunmu nodded to her words, agreeing with them. But there were also some facts wrong among what she said. After becoming gods, they didn’t sense the laws of grand dao because they used godhood to make up for their flaws.

In the Origin World, even if someone became a god using godhood as long as they strived hard to comprehend the laws of it, their advancement speed would be very fast. For example, Little Bu who had used godhood was now an ancient goddess.

The biggest obstruction in becoming an ancient god was the power of belief introduced by Goumang Real World. With its existence, people didn’t need to bitterly chase after the god realm. They could just use the power of belief to become a god, and after that, they would be forced to continue using power of belief to advance.

The entire Origin World’s power of belief could allow only a single person to advance to true god realm. However, there were numerous gods in the Origin World, as well as ancient gods and master gods.

All of them got easily addicted to using power of belief to advance quickly, and they ultimately renounced comprehension of godhood to focus on competition for power of belief.

“I feel that you have a point, but—”

Just when Li Yunmu was about to retort, Yan Wanqiu shook her hand and said knowingly, “I know what you want to say, isn’t it about the damage of power of belief that harmed your Origin World? You are wrong though, and I will tell you why. Now, listen about the cultivation of my world.

“In the Goumang Real World, anyone who wants to cultivate must possess a spirit root. Without it, they can only be ordinary people. Those with spirit roots have to pay respect to a master and then enter a sect to cultivate. There are five main realms before becoming immortal, namely, returning origin, foundation building, golden core, yuanying, and passing tribulation.”

Li Yunmu put the names of the five stages to memory. They were completely different from the realms before god realm in the Origin World. He then continued listening to Yan Wanqiu’s speech.

“You all have a smooth sailing until you attain half god realm, but we don’t. We must pass three calamities and nine tribulations, which are divided into rupturing calamity during foundation building, scattering calamity during golden core, and destruction calamity during Yuanying.

“After the three calamities, if fifty out of a hundred people make it, it is already a very good result. Those who survive then have to go through nine tribulations. They have to go through three when going from golden core to yuanyin, thren three when going from yuanyin to passing tribulation, and then three more to become an immortal. During the last six tribulations, even three out of a hundred passing is an optimistic result.

After saying that, Yan Wanqiu stopped and returned to the chicken leg in her hand.

Li Yunmu frowned once he heard Yan Wanqiu’s words. He had never expected that the cultivation system of the Goumang Real World would be so cruel. It was extremely hard before reaching the immortal stage, apart from the returning origin stage which should be equivalent to flux expert, the other four stages had three calamities and nine tribulations.

Because of that, anyone in the tribulation passing stage could be considered as very formidable.

Li Yunmu turned toward Jue Qingi and couldn’t help but feel regretful. According to Yan Wanqiu’s words, Jue Qingzi reaching tribulation passing stage could already be considered as a very high achievement. Anyone who could become an immortal through such a terrifying cultivation setting would definitely be more formidable than the gods of the Origin WOrld.

“I will continue. There are four realms after becoming an immortal, namely true immortal, golden immortal, great principal golden immortal, and sage. The first three realms have three tribulations. That’s why I said that it was very easy to become a god in the Origin World. You have no more ways to refute it, right?” Yan Wanqiu asked earnestly while nibbling on the chicken leg.

Li Yunmu nodded. The cultivation system of the Origin World was indeed far easier compared to that of the Goumang Real World. It was smooth sailing before becoming a god, and after reaching half god real, they could use godhood to become a god.

Yan Wanqiu looked at Li Yunmu in approval and said, “There’s still one more thing I want to say. Although Goumang Real World’s cultivation is challenging, after passing every tribulation, heaven will repay one with laws of grand daos. Because of this, there is always a steady flow of experts in Goumang Real World, which is how it left the Origin World far behind.”

Li Yunmu didn’t say anything and recalled the situation on Earth. Previously, he had suspected that when True God created the gods of the Origin World, they had some sort of anomalies; otherwise, why were the Earth’s people identical to those from beyond the heavens.

After combining some facts, he had thought that the system had created the Earth in order to experiment. Now, when he heard Yan Wanqiu’s words, he began to understand. The system hadn’t obtained the cultivation system of Goumang Real World, so it could only make some guesses.

The result of it was that although Earth had many half god powerhouses, there wasn’t anyone who could become a god. Before, Li Yunmu and the system had thought that the reason for it was insufficient time. If they continued developing for a longer time, then someone was bound to become a god.

But after they heard Yan Wanqiu’s words, they understood the problem. The answer lay in the three calamities and nine tribulations. Although people of Earth matured through battle and were able to reach half god step after discovering flux energy, they lost their direction afterwards.

Some of them relied on world fragments to absorb the energy of other people to advance their heavenly world in order to become gods, while others continued increasing their strength by creating battle armor.

But both of those were external strength, and so the wrong direction. That was why no one was able to become a god on Earth even after it had existed for a very long time. The problem could only be solved by the addition of three calamities and nine tribulations, and using the laws of Origin World to discard godhood.

As long as they did that, a god would very quickly appear on Earth. After the first, there would then be a second, a third and many more. They would quickly raise to hundreds or even thousands. Another additional benefit would be that their path would become quite smooth after becoming a god, since they wouldn’t need to comprehend the laws of godhood after becoming a god.

In the mortal stage, comprehending the laws could be used a method to reward for successfully passing the tribulation. At that time, if a cultivator who had comprehended the laws created a martial art, it would be countless times more formidable than those created previously.

Now that Li Yunmu and the system learned the method, they only needed time to surpass the threat, Goumang Real World.

Once the laws of the Origin World changed, the only disadvantage would be that it would offend the gods of the Origin World. After all, when the transformation began, the new cultivation system would allow mortals to stand together with gods.

chapters.title: Chapter 927 - Yan Wanqiu Who Loves To Eat Chicken Legs
chapters.body:
Chapter 927 - Yan Wanqiu Who Loves To Eat Chicken Legs

Chapter 927: Yan Wanqiu Who Loves to Eat Chicken Legs

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

[This method can work. But to really act upon it, we need to start a battle of gods. However, there is no longer enough godhoods in the Origin World. When I created godhoods, I did so by congealing them within the three thousand grand daos. A part of them has been lost with time, but the majority of them still exist in this world.

[Creating the three calamities and nine tribulations isn’t difficult, but what is difficult is creating the fragments of laws to be used as repayment after crossing the tribulation passing stage. If you want to bring a transformation, you can only make the gods of the Origin World perish. The higher number of gods who perish, the higher number of people will be able to become gods in the future,] the system slowly explained.

After learning about the cultivation system from Yan Wanqiu, Li Yunmu immediately realized that the path they were walking originally was wrong. Right then, since he knew how to change the situation, he was firm in his decision to continue.

Origin World’s gods had to die. And even if they did not die, they had to at least hand over their godhood and be reborn as completely new people.

“I have thought about this problem. The gods of Ancient Lands have already perished, so many of the grand daos should’ve been reborn in the world. Furthermore, the battle of gods is continuing in Lanlou, so even more grand daos will appear after it is finished, “Li Yunmu communicated mentally to the system .

After he finished talking, the system’s sneer echoed in his mind, and it said, [Do you think only several people would have become gods using godhood in Lanlou apart from the seven ancient gods? Also in the Ancient Lands, did you think that there were only a few ancient gods in it when you destroyed it?]

Li Yunmu carefully thought about it. People had been using power of belief in Lanlou for a long time to become gods. From the original three thousand godhoods, many had disappeared or perhaps were in the bodies of others, which meant that there were none remaining in the world. Not one of the several thousand gods under the seven ancient gods had used godhood to become a god, so even if they died, the godhood wouldn’t appear in the world.

It was really a deep fraud…

Li Yunmu was somewhat embarrassed. He had already thought of how to transform the Origin World, but he lacked the godhood. Additionally, the system’s other words caught his attention. Weren’t there too few ancient gods in the Ancient Lands?

After some careful thinking, he recalled that there were four ancient gods in Ancient Lands at that time. Besides them, there were only a few scattered gods.

At that time, he had undergone demonic transformation and destroyed the Ancient Lands so he didn’t think much about it. Now though, he did find it somewhat strange.

Lanlou claimed the highest number of gods in the Origin World. The other four regions had very few gods. But the Ancient Lands were different, and when he had gone there at that time, the outer periphery had a seal so it could be assumed that some sort of unforeseen accident had happened in the Ancient Lands previously.

“What happened in the Ancient Lands back in the day?” Li Yunmu asked in his mind.

[You should think about it yourself. Why would the other four regions have so many gods, while the Ancient Lands had so few?]

After saying that, the system disappeared, leaving behind a dumbfounded Li Yunmu. Who would know why the number of gods in the Ancient Lands was so small! Right then, he was most concerned about whether the godhoods of Lanlou and Ancient Lands could maintain the consumption in the early stages of transformation.

As the red-crowned cranes flew through the sky, the twins were holding onto feathers with their hands and curiously looking around. Yan Wanqiu, in the meantime, was focused on Jue Qingzi. She sunk into contemplation from time to time, then would shake her head and sigh. Occasionally, she also glanced at the nightscape while holding a chicken leg in her hand.

Li Yunmu snapped back to attention and looked at the chicken leg in Yan Wanqiu’s hand, then asked with some surprise, “This is your fortieth today, right?”

From the time he began traveling with Jue Qingzi and the others, he had seen Yan Wanqiu eat one chicken leg followed by another. Due to boredom, he even counted them and realized that it was her fortieth one.

Yan Wanqiu noticed the hint of astonishment in Li Yunmu’s tone and said while shaking her head without paying much attention to the surprise, “You are wrong.
