From the time we started to when we encountered you, I had already eaten a hundred chicken legs. Just now, while you were thinking, this elder sister settled a few more. In fact, today I have eaten one hundred and fifty-two chicken legs.”

As she said that, she nibbled on the chicken leg in her hand, and a hint of satisfaction appeared on her face.

Li Yunmu looked at the twins who had been silently sitting in the back and suspiciously asked Yan Wanqiu, “Are Dong Tongtong and Tong Dongdong mute? They haven’t said anything throughout the whole journey.”

“They aren’t mute. They are practicing a secret technique of Profound Sword Pavilion, which is quite similar to the silent meditation of buddist schools. From the time they begin cultivation, they cannot speak, but their cultivation gradually increases as time passes. Once they open their mouth, they will shoot a sword beam.

“According to legends, there was previously an elder of Profound Sword Sect who had kept his mouth closed from returning to the origin stage to the great principal golden immortal stage. Later, when the pavilion encountered a formidable enemy, he opened his mouth and destroyed them in one attack.”

The secret technique mentioned by Yan Wanqiu was rather mystical and somewhat abnormal. Even those with high aptitude would require at least a thousand years from returning origin to great principal golden immortal. Who would be able to endure not speaking a word for a thousand years?

Yan Wanqiu threw away the chicken bone, wiped the oil using her handkerchief, and said, “Oh right, we need to swap the cultivation methods of our world, as we agreed just now.”

Li Yunmu nodded. He took out five cultivation relaying globes created in Asura City and three more of high level cultivation skills created by the system. The eight pearl-sized cultivation relaying globes began to float in the air above his hand.

Yan Wanqiu took the eight cultivation relaying globes, then placed them on the jade bracelet on her left hand. A faint light flickered, and the cultivation relaying globes instantly disappeared. After that, she extended her two fingers toward her head and pulled out a white feather. After rubbing it a few times, she handed it over to Li Yunmu.

The two of them completed the exchange to their satisfaction.

Yan Wanqiu then looked to the front and said in a calm tone, “We’ve arrived at the god ruins.”

Following her gaze, Li Yunmu saw an enormous mountain soaring to the heavens, A few sparkling flames could be seen halfway up the mountain, where the presences of several tribulation passing stage people were hidden. They had varying strength, but the most formidable among them was at the peak tribulation passing stage while the weakest was at the initial tribulation passing stage.

Li Yunmu looked at the late tribulation passing stage Jue Qingzi, who was sitting like a statue and who could be considered among the upper tier of people rushing to contest for the god ruins. If he used his full strength, he might even come out as a winner.

Li Yunmu thought about Yan Wanqiu’s previous words and turned around to enquire, “Looking at these people, Jue Qingzi’s strength should be among the upper tier, then how come he hasn’t be able to snatch a godhood after remaining in the night pearl’s small world for so many years?”

The moment he said that, a resentful expression appeared on Yan Wanqiu’s face, and she hatefully said, “Only if senior apprentice brother didn’t have so many apprehensions. Although his strength is among the upper tier in the night pearl small world, he is worried about Leng Family’s enormous strength and that young master of Leng Family had helped reserve a spot for me and the twins. Therefore, senior apprentice brother is very grateful toward Leng Family’s young master.

“Many years have passed in the night pearl’s small world, and he has been turned into a complete lackey who opens the path to the ruins for others. As a result, the young master of the Leng Family has obtained godhood again and again, so now many of his henchmen have already comprehended the laws and are on the eve of becoming immortals!”

chapters.title: Chapter 928 - Leng Yan
chapters.body:
Chapter 928 - Leng Yan

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 929 - Ancient God Ru Shou
chapters.body:
Chapter 929 - Ancient God Ru Shou

“Ru Shou? Who is he?” Li Yunmu mentally enquired with the system.

The system was silent for a long time before slowly saying, [Ru Shou was one of the ancient gods of Ancient Lands. After he perished, his godhood also disappeared. I hadn’t expected that it would appear in this world. It is really surprising.]

Ancient god perished?

Li Yunmu made a few guesses in his heart, then asked mentally, “Did Ancient God Ru Shou perish in the first battle of gods or in the invasion of the Goumang Real World?”

[During the first battle of gods, all the gods fought for the power of belief in a chaotic war while I was resisting the Goumang Real World on the outside. When I returned to the Origin World, many ancient gods had perished, and most them belonged to Ancient Lands. At that time, I didn’t pay much attention to it, but now I fear that it wasn’t a simple matter!] the system said in a cold voice, with a hint of anger concealed within.

Li Yunmu didn’t reply but thought over the system’s words. After the first battle of gods caused by power of belief, someone among the five master gods began to collaborate with the Goumang Real World. If Ancient God Ru Shou had perished in the battle between the two worlds, then the appearance of his godhood in the night pearl small world would be very ordinary.

But if he died in the internal strife, how could his godhood have been leaked outside and appear in the night pearl small world, forming god ruins?

There was only one possibility, and it was that before the battle of the gods started, the master god of Ancient Lands had already colluded with the Goumang Real World by using ancient god’s godhood for profit. Naturally, it was just a guess, but if it was true, then this secret was very large. It would be both astonishing and have a huge impact on the world.

Li Yunmu’s eyes shone while he thought about the system’s words earlier, that Ancient Lands had few ancient gods. It seemed like someone had traded them away to the Goumang Real World for profit. They had used the battle of gods as a cover, so the disappearance of many ancient gods only seemed logical.

Even the system who was the True God didn’t sense anything amiss.

“At that time, did the Ancient Lands have the most ancient gods and gods?”

Li Yunmu followed behind Jue Qingzi and others to enter the god ruins while talking inside his mind with the system.

[Before the battle of gods started, the Ancient Lands had indeed the largest number of gods and ancient gods. It was called the main region. After the battle of gods, however, the majority of the ancient gods and gods of Ancient Lands perished.

“Their godhood was then used to collaborate with beyond the heavens… Pangu seems to have been dealing with them for a very long time. He had certainly hid himself deeply,] the system said icily.

Based on its tone of voice, Li Yunmu knew that the system had discovered the collaboration between Pangu and beyond the heavens only now. In other words, the system had been hoodwinked until then. But was there only one master god who had relied on the Goumang Real World?

The system had previously guessed that there were two master gods, but now it seemed that the majority of them had come to rely on beyond the heavens. That was a great disappointment for the system, even causing its heart to turn cold. But it wasn’t only the system who felt that way. Li Yunmu also felt his heart grow cold after realizing what wasd going on.

Gods really didn’t have any emotions and only thought about themselves.

After passing through the wooden door, everyone reached a platform halfway up the mountain. The large door behind them began to reflect the scenery of the mountain, but the red-crowned cranes on which they were sitting previously were nowhere to be seen. Li Yunmu looked at the scenery which was identical to the outside world and touched the restriction destroying halo in his hand.

Ripples floated out from the restriction destroying halo. They expanded in all directions and passed through the bodies of the talents of the Alliance without them sensing anything.

When the ripples emitted from the restriction destroying halo touched the entire surface, Li Yunmu saw the scenery change. He saw the shrubs transform into a gloomy region that had a black coffin at the center.

So it was all an illusion, Li Yunmu mumbled in his heart. A moment ago, when he had entered the god ruins and seen that the scenery was similar to the outside world, he was a bit surprised.

Although he wasn’t someone who practiced spell formations and hadn’t cultivated a heavenly eye, he was still a quasi master god in terms of strength. By relying on his profound cultivation, he was still able to sense that something was wrong.

Li Yunmu shot a glance at Jue Qingzi, whose both eyes were shining. He was not confused by the surrounding scenery. A glance at Yan Wanqiu and the twins showed that they also had bright expressions and were not intimidated by the scenery.

Li Yunmu walked behind them and used mental transmission to communicate with Jue Qingzi. “Brother Jue Qingzi, how did you see through the illusion?”

“I walk the path of the sword immortal, so I pass through my life together with a sword and form a sword heart. Naturally then, I wouldn’t be confused by external things,” Jue Qingzi explained in simple terms. He was no longer as talkative as before.

Li Yunmu understood what he meant and used a mental transmission to communicate with Yan Wanqiu.

“How did you know that we’ve entered an illusion?” he asked with curiosity.

Based on the Origin World’s cultivation system, Yan Wanqiu should be classified as a mid stage sage flux expert, since she was in golden core stage in the Goumang Real World, who did not have a very strong soul. Yet the thoughts she transmitted were the same as those of Jue Qingzi—sword immortals possessed a sword heart and could resist all illusions.

After she saying that, a shaking thought came from Yan Wanqiu, “You… don’t… worry… about twins. The secret technique… they cultivate… can allow them to retain clarity.”

“You first practice mental transmission! Then speak!”

Li Yunmu passed his thoughts to Yan Wanqiu’s mind, and after a moment, she turned around and shot a glance at him.

When the white-gowned people walking in the front saw the illusion, their leader opened his wooden umbrella and a formless energy passed in all directions. It collided with the surrounding scenery, and it seemed to burn and melt like paper, revealing the true appearance of the god ruins.

Li Yunmu observed the completely sealed cavern with a black coffin at the center. Five lamps were hanging in the surroundings, burning with deep blue flame. When everyone saw the coffin, they revealed astonished expressions.

After a long time of silence, Leng Yan looked at the black coffin right under his nose and a hint of greed appeared in his eyes. “I hadn’t expected that the Alliance would surprisingly arrange such a simple god ruin.”

The people concealed in the black mist as well as white-gowned ones didn’t say anything, but a hint of greed appeared in their eyes as well.

Li Yunmu examined everyone’s expressions before shifting his gaze to the black coffin. At that moment, the system’s voice echoed in his brain.

[There’s some problem with this black coffin! There is the body as well as the godhood of Ru Shou inside it, but…]

“But what?” Li Yunmu asked when the system did not continue.

[Ru Shou’s body has already been turned into a zombie! If these people of beyond the heavens’ younger generation open the black coffin, Ru Shou will certainly awaken. An ancient god turned into zombie… How could these little devils who haven’t even become gods resist it? They will be wiped out. The Alliance from beyond the heavens is really ruthless regarding the experiences of their younger generations.]

chapters.title: Chapter 930 - Yang Kong’S Sense Of Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 930 - Yang Kong’S Sense Of Crisis

The majority of the gods of the Origin World walked the path of close quarters combat, and Ancient God Ru Shou’s physical body was also at ancient god level, so even after perishing and becoming a corpse demon, he was still a formidable existence. Unless one was in the god realm, they could not fight against him.

In the small world, apart from Li Yunmu who was disguising himself as a pig to eat the tiger, whether it was the white-gowned people or those in black mist, all of them were at best half gods.

Once the corpse demon came out, beyond the heavens’ younger generation would probably die. Only Jue Qingzi’s group, which was under Li Yunmu’s protection, would escape safely.

Everyone moved around the coffin but no one dared to open it. Who knew what sort of arrangements the Alliance had made for the god ruins of night pearl small world to ensure that the younger generation gained experience to pass the tribulation and become immortals. There were always many dangers in the god ruins, and only after crossing the final step could they obtain the godhood.

In the god ruins they had just entered, there was an illusion at the beginning. After it was eliminated, they arrived in front of the coffin. By following the predetermined path, they had arrived at the final juncture, so now they needed to open the coffin and take out the godhood.

But there had to be something wrong with the situation. No one could believe that the Alliance would let them obtain godhood so smoothly.

Leng Yan looked at the white-gowned people and those in black mists, then said with a smile, “What do you intend to do about this deadlock?”

The white-gowned people and the black mist people didn’t reply as if they were mute.

Yang Kong, who was standing behind Leng Yan, extended his head toward Jue Qingzi and said with a sinister smile, “Since Nine Palace and Yin Manor’s people aren’t willing to go, then we should allow Brother Jue Qingzi to go and take a look. After all, for many years now, Brother Jue Qingzi has been acting as a lackey of Young Master Leng. This time should also be the same.”

Leng Yan did not say anything as if it wasn’t related to him. The two maids by his side, in the meantime, revealed coquettish smiles as if looking at a good show.

Yan Wanqiu took a step forward and stood in front of Jue Qingzi before speaking up with hands on her waist. “Aren’t you also Leng Yan’s lackey?! Then why are you asking my senior apprentice brother to go? Why don’t you go yourself?”

A smile appeared on Yang Kong’s grotesque face, and he said unhurriedly, “If I walked the path of sword immortal, then I would go without saying anything. Younger sister, you must know that I practice poison attacks. Everyone should handle their jobs. I will do my job, while Jue Qingzi should do his. Jue Qingzi, what do you say?”

“You!”

Just like Yang Kong said, everyone entering the god ruins had their job. Yang Kong was an expert in the field of poison and good at removing poison from corpses. The white gowns were experts in spell formation, while the people in black mists could subdue evil creatures. The two maids from Bell Sound School could use sound waves to confuse beasts buried in the tombs.

And Jue Qingzi was the best at walking in the front. In terms of strength, no one on the scene could beat a sword immortal’s bloodline. Such a formidable ability was most suitable for opening the path. After all, even if they encountered a dangerous situation, he could still retreat by relying on his strength.

At ordinary times, Jue QIngzi only needed to follow Leng Yan through the god ruins to obtain a godhood, but who knew what sort of transformation might happen after opening an evil-looking coffin.

If Jue Qingzi was injured, then Leng Yan’s side would only say a few words to comfort him, so Yan Wanqiu wouldn’t allow her sect’s senior apprentice brother to go up for such a bad deal.

After a long time, everyone’s gaze returned to Jue Qingzi.

Yang Kong, who still stood at Leng Yan’s side, revealed a hint of hesitation and slowly said, “Jue Qingzi, you should know that your junior disciples were only able to come to the night pearl small world because of Young Master Leng’s assistance. Otherwise, how could you have obtained so many places with your declining Profound Sword Pavilion?”

The moment he said that, Jue Qingzi moved Yan Wanqiu, who was standing in front of him, to the side and said in calm tone, “Junior apprentice sister, step aside. I will assist fellow dao friends in opening the coffin.”

Just as he took a step forward after saying that, his left arm was pulled by a powerful force. Jue Qingzi turned around to take a look to see that Li Yunmu was pulling his arm. Li Yunmu shook his head, and pointed at himself, then at the coffin and himself once more.

“…”

Jue Qingzi was somewhat confused when Li Yunmu pointed around instead of saying anything.

Next to him, Yan Wanqiu’s gaze flickered, and she quickly took a step forward to bring him aside. “Senior apprentice brother, let junior apprentice brother go. He is also from the sword immortal’s lineage.”

After saying that, she winked at Jue Qingzi to remind him of their pretense. It took Jue Qingzi a moment to recall that the person standing in front of him wasn’t his junior apprentice brother, but rather an expert of the Origin World possessing the strength of a golden immortal.

“En, this time I will let you, junior apprentice brother, go,” Jue Qingzi said with a solemn expression.

Li Yunmu choked down a smile, then nodded and slowly walked toward the coffin. Leng Yan and the others who were standing on the sides turned silent, and the smiles on their faces also froze. Everyone felt strange. They had thought that Jue Qingzi would go to open the coffin himself, but who would have guessed that the mute junior apprentice brother who practiced the secret technique of Profound Sound Pavilion would volunteer himself to be the one to open the path.

Did that junior apprentice brother of Profound Sword Pavilion who was only releasing a foundation stage presence want to make people laugh?

Li Yunmu slowly walked forward until he reached the coffin. He then opened the lid, revealing the corpse inside. It was a man with his eyes shut. An enormous tiger was under his legs, while two refined black dragons were curled around his shoulders. A weak golden light was being emitted from the man’s chest, but apart from that, there was no presence coming from his body.

It was Ancient God Ru Shou who had perished a long time ago. There were no abnormalities even after he had changed into a corpse demon. He retained his original appearance and seemed to be like a living person who was sleeping.

After sensing the presence of godhood, Leng Yan, who was standing by Yang Kong’s side, grew cheerful and shouted loudly, “Younger apprentice brother, quickly take out that godhood.”

Li Yunmu pretended to not have heard it. Out of the corner of his eyes, he saw that there were countless scratches on the inner side of the coffin lid and softly flipped it over to carefully observe it. The countless scratches were made by grabbing at the back of the coffin lid, so could it be that Ancient God Ru Shou had been sealed inside before he died?

But with Ancient God Ru Shou’s strength, was it possible that someone could even seal his cultivation, which would have resulted in Ru Shou becoming an ordinary person possessing an ancient god’s body? It was the only way for him to be tortured to death until his vitality was exhausted.

Li Yunmu threw the coffin’s lid to the ground, which resulted in an incredibly loud sound.

Leng Yan was shocked by how tyrannical the Profound Sword Pavilion’s junior apprentice brother suddenly became. If he could throw away the coffin’s lid just like that, how formidable was the strength stored in his foundation stage body?

Why was he cultivating in the Profound Sword Pavilion with such a tyrannical nature?

“Junior brother should’ve finished watching. Now quickly take out the godhood,” Yang Kong said anxiously without knowing why he was feeling a sense of crisis even though nothing had happened after opening the coffin. According to common sense though, after opening the coffin, the god’s corpse inside should spew out the poison stored inside it.

But even after the lid was removed, there wasn’t any corpse poison or any other type of danger. Because of that, a sense of crisis rose in his heart, and he grew restless. He wanted Profound Sword Pavilion’s younger disciple to take out the godhood so they could leave as soon as possible.

chapters.title: Chapter 931 - Ancient God’S Corpse Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 931 - Ancient God’S Corpse Demon

Yang Kong, who stood behind Leng Yan, felt an indescribable sense of crisis in his heart because of which he anxiously tapped with his foot. By relying on his intuition, he was convinced that the god ruins wouldn’t be so simple. The Alliance would never arrange a god ruins completely lacking in any danger in the night pearl small world. Yet from the time they entered to the time the coffin lid was removed, they hadn’t encountered anything other than an illusion.

The easier it was, the more anxious he became.

Moreover his intuition was rarely wrong. Once he sensed that something was wrong, a crisis would definitely appear.

Leng Yan and the two maids looked at Yang Kong anxiously tapping his foot, and a hint of confusion appeared in their eyes. They then looked at Li Yunmu standing besides the coffin.

“Little brother, since Yang Kong has said that there’s danger, you should quickly take out the godhood,” Leng Yan said. “We should quickly leave the god ruins, then we can negotiate the matter of distribution. As for other matters, we can slowly talk over them once we’re all safe.”

The moment he finished speaking, Li Yunmu pulled Ancient God Ru Shou’s hand and passed a strand of god power through his body. Then, the lifted hand smashed into his chest, instantly causing him to lose consciousness.

Leng Yan looked at the young man with a dumbfounded expression, unable to react. What exactly was going on? He had told the little thing to take the godhood and walk away, so why was he acting like a deaf person and observing the corpse in which the godhood was stuck?

“Brother Jue Qingzi, does this junior brother of Profound Sword Pavilion have some inborn defects?” Leng Yan turned to enquire.

Just as Jue Qingzi was about to speak, Yan Wanqiu hastily jumped out and said, “Oh right, junior apprentice brother is deaf.”

The moment she said those words, a loud howl which could be heard throughout the entire cave resounded from the coffin. One after another, layers of profound corpse gas spread out. A pair of delicate hands extended from the coffin, followed by two legs, and a body. When Ancient God Ru Shou walked out the corpse gas, it went inside his body through his nose and ears.

“Corpse demon…”

One of the people of the Yin Manor covered in the black fog examined the god level corpse getting up. Soon after, a line came from the black fog, which was filled with a hint of excitement and anticipation. As for whether the man was scared or if he felt true excitement born from the bottom of his heart, only he himself knew.

What concerned Leng Yan and Nine Palace’s white-gowned people, they were completely clear in their hearts that after encountering the corpse demon, it was much more important to subdue it compared to taking hold of the godhood.

After all, corpse demons were the combat power of Yin Manor’s disciples. Upon encountering one of such strength in the god ruins, the Yin Manor wouldn’t join the fight with white gowns and Leng Yan over the godhood.

A hint of madness flashed in the eyes of Leng Yan after seeing the golden light in the chest of the god’s corpse demon. As long as he only needed to fight with the people of Nine Palaces over the godhood, his chances of winning would be higher.

Leng Yan looked at the people in the black mist and said, “Yin Manor’s people, you all can attack. This corpse demon will be yours, but hand over the godhood afterwards.”

“No problem, after I get this corpse demon, I won’t join the contest between you over the godhood,” a voice said from the black mist.

The next instant, the black fog which originally very dark and thick split open. It formed into eight balls of black fog in front of the corpse demon. Eight long golden ropes flew out like hands, binding Ancient God Ru Shou, and a pool of blood passed from the end of the eight golden ropes connected with the black god.

The blood flowed along the golden ropes and entered the skin of Ancient God Ru Shou, forming eight strange imprints.

“Ah!”

Ancient god Ru Shou whose eyes were closed released a loud howl and opened his eyes, revealing pitch-black pupils. The two black dragons on his shoulders also awakened with black flames on their tongues.

Ancient God Ru Shou turned to look at the people all around him. His gaze went past the white gowns as well as Leng Yan and firmly fixed on the eight disciples of Yin Manor. Before anyone could react, he then disappeared.

“This is impossible, how can the nine seals of Yin Manor be unable to seal this corpse demon!” the disciple of Yin Manor standing at the front said as the black fog surrounding his body rushed forth.

Pa!

The corpse demon appeared out of nowhere in front of the Yun Manor’s disciple and extended his hand into the black fog. There was only a loud noise, and the black fog scattered. Black clothes and some ashes fell to the ground.

“Too bad, this is an ancient god’s corpse demon. We don’t have the power to subdue it so we will retreat first.”

The disciples of Yin Manor recognized that the corpse demon was one intentionally arranged by the power of Yin Manor in the night pearl small world. According to the records of Yin Manor, the corpse demon was formerly an ancient god of the Origin World.

An ancient god was equivalent to a golden immortal. This kind of existence had been refined into a corpse demon by accumulating a mouthful of resentment, so his strength was only slightly weaker than when he was alive.

Apart from being unable to use divine energy and abilities, he could kill a true immortal by just relying on the ancient god level physical body. Yet their group was composed of peak stage tribulation passing experts, so standing in front of an ancient god’s corpse demon was the same as courting death.

After speaking, the remaining seven black fogs combined together, and a bright light flashed, which they entered together.

Leng Yan took note of it and turned toward the Nine Palaces’ white gowns and said, “Dao brothers, are you all going to leave as well or will you follow me to subdue this corpse demon?”

“We will try.”

The nine disciples of Nine Palaces released their wooden umbrellas and raised them into the sky. While rotating, they flew toward the corpse demon from all sides. Nine wooden umbrellas fixed in their positions as if they had been placed there meticulously.

The originally ordinary wooden umbrellas erupted with layers of powerful pressure, and a silk thread flew out of the tops and bottoms of the umbrellas. It twisted in the air as it went toward other wooden umbrellas.

In a flash, the corpse demon was trapped in the spell formation of Nine Palaces formed from threads. When Leng Yan saw that, he smiled. “Good, good. Dao brothers come from Nine Palaces, so this spell formation naturally isn’t ordinary.”

The corpse demon trapped in the spell formation stopped for a moment, but just when Leng Yan finished speaking, he slowly lifted his leg and pulled the threads of Nine Palace’s spell formation. They were cut off, and the corpse demon charged out of the spell formation.

“…” Leng Yan.

Who could say what was wrong with him on that day. His face was being slapped again and again, right as he finished talking.

Once the threads were snapped, the Nine Palaces’ spell formation disappeared, and the nine wooden umbrellas returned to their owners. The nine people looked at each other with a hint of apprehension in their eyes.

After dying, the corpse demon had no soul. To deal with such a soulless creature, the method was to arrange a spell formation to trap it. So they had used a spell formation from the Nine Palaces.

Once anyone was caught in it, the white gowns would feel multitudes of changes in the spell formation. Yet the ancient god’s corpse demon came out of the Nine Palaces’ spell formation, which made the head of the white gowns become vigilant.

“We, the disciples of Nine Palaces, are unable to deal with this ancient god’s corpse demon. Brother Leng Yan, we will leave this godhood to you, goodbye!”

After those words, a fragment of the key appeared in the hands of the leader of white gowns. It floated in the air to form a streak of white light which engulfed the disciples of Nine Palaces.

Only Jue Qingzi’s and Leng Yan’s groups remained in the cave.

Leng Yan looked at Jue Qingzi and said with a smile, “Brother, this time we will need to rely on you! This ancient god’s corpse demon is extremely formidable, so only the lineage of sword immortal can have the strength to contend against it! What do you think?”

chapters.title: Chapter 932 - Repeated Misfortunes
chapters.body:
Chapter 932 - Repeated Misfortunes

Chapter 932: Repeated Misfortunes

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

When Jue Qingzi heard those words, he began to frown slightly, which he had never done before. Although his benevolent heart made it difficult for him to refuse the requests of others, especially the requests of Leng Yan who had provided him three extra spaces in the quota of people entering the night pearl small world, what they were confronting at that moment was was corpse demon of an ancient god.

Its strength was even more formidable than that of a god.

Although he belonged to the lineage of sword immortals and his formidable strength allowed him to challenge enemies above his realm, there was a limit to how tyrannical his power could be. He could barely resist an initial stage true immortal, so there was no way that he could be an enemy for an ancient god’s corpse demon.

Jue Qingzi turned to look at Li Yunmu lying next to the coffin, but he couldn’t sense any vitality from the man’s body. His brows creased, for he had no idea what exactly the golden immortal almighty was thinking of doing.

If a true immortal went up against an ancient god’s corpse demon, they would be killed instantly, but if an ancient god’s corpse demon went up against a golden immortal powerhouse, they would be crushed straight away.

So what was Li Yunmu doing? He had observed the lid of the coffin and even lifted the hand of the ancient god’s corpse demon. But even if that was forgotten, he was a golden immortal powerhouse. His cultivation was similar to that of the corpse demon before he died and their physical bodies were both at ancient god level, so how could Li Yunmu have lost consciousness after being hit by a single slap from the corpse demon.?

Jue Qingzi did not believe it.

An energy fluctuation flashed at the corner of his eyes, and Jue Qingzi saw a thread of black mist rise from Li Yunmu’s body. It flew in Leng Yan’s direction and coiled around his legs, then rose up, forming a pair of black hands at his waist. The next instant, the key fragment of god ruins appeared in the hands of the black mist.

Every god ruins required a key to enter, and the key fragment in the hands was precisely that. Leng Yan had one, just like the people of Yin Manor and Nine Palaces’ disciples. Without the key fragment, they would be trapped inside the cave due to their tribulation passing stage cultivation.

The black mist hand swallowed the key fragment and returned to the body lying prone on the ground.

Jue Qingzi was watching from beginning to the end, but Leng Yan as well as Yang Kong and the two maids did not anything amiss since their attention was completely focused on the corpse demon.

“Oi, idiot, you shouldn’t agree and continue acting as their lackey, don’t you know that? This metal attribute’s godhood is for you, since I made a promise to your younger apprentice sister. Now take your junior disciples to the side and use this key fragment to leave!”

Jue Qingzi followed the order of the voice and saw a transparent Li Yunmu handing him the key fragment while his main body was still lying on the ground without anyone paying it any attention.

After hearing Li Yunmu’s words, he nodded in agreement.

Before them was an ancient god’s corpse demon, so how could he possibly continue helping Leng Yan as his lackey and go to fight against the corpse demon? He really couldn’t continue acting as usually for it would be pure idiocy. He had already been Leng Yan’s lackey several times over the years. Considering that Leng Yan had provided him with three extra slots, he had already repaid his kindness long ago.

Leng Yan’s gaze shifted from the corpse demon after he noticed that there wasn’t any response from Jue Qingzi. He turned to look and saw Jue Qingzi pulling Yan Wanqiu and the twins behind him while they retreated to the edge of the cave with a key fragment.

Leng Yan subconsciously opened his spatial ring to take a look and found that the key fragment he owned had disappeared. When he looked up to see the key fragment in Jue Qingzi’s hand once more, the faint smile on his face disappeared, and he gloomily said, “Brother Jue Qingzi, when did Profound Sword Pavilion teach you stealing? If you hand over the key fragment right now, I can pretend that this matter never happened. But if you continue persisting with your way, then you should think about your sect.”

When Yan Wanqiu saw the key fragment in Jue Qingzi’s hand, she was slightly startled. But without waiting for her to ask about it, Jue Qingzi looked at Leng Yan and said calmly, “Brother Leng, come out of here alive before threatening me.”

He then turned the key fragment in reverse, creating a white light which pulled them inside.

The white light had only been present for an instant, and Jue Qingzi and his fellow disciples disappeared without any trace, returning to the mountain outside.

In the cave, Leng Yan and his two maids were looking at the place where Jue Qingzi disappeared with a dumbfounded expressions. The three of them hadn’t realized that Jue Qingzi this time was different compared to the past.

Yang Kong looked at the ancient god’s corpse demon, and his complexion went pale. He could sense the strength of the corpse demon. Yet the only way to leave the god ruins, the key fragment, had disappeared, which drove him crazy.

“Without the ruin fragment, we will all die here!” Yang Kong shrieked as he continued tapping his foot against the ground.

“Young Master Leng, what should we do now?” The two maids frowned while looking at the corpse demon walking in front of them. “What about that restriction destroying seal bestowed upon you earlier!”

Usually, without the key fragment, those without the strength of a true immortal or above didn’t have any way to leave the god ruins. That was because when the Alliance created the god ruins, they had intentionally sealed them off from all around.

But the two maids of Leng Yan were clear that Leng Yan had secretly used his authority in the clan as well as the higher position in the Alliance to come, so he wouldn’t have entered the god ruins with just a key fragment. He also had to have an even higher level restriction breaking seal which could open the sealed god ruins.

The restriction breaking seal was bestowed by the upper echelons upon him because they knew that the god ruin this time was different from other ones. The godhood concealed inside it was an extremely precious godhood of an ancient god.

“Oh right, I still have the restriction breaking seal.”

After being reminded by the two maids, Leng Yan recalled the restriction destroying seal bestowed upon him by the upper echelons. With this restriction destroying seal, he wasn’t very anxious. He should first think of a way to obtain the ancient god’s godhood stored in the corpse demon.

He shifted his gaze to the corpse demon in front of him, and a smile appeared on his lips.

“We four will try our best to get our hands on the godhood inside the corpse demon.”

Leng Yan saw that the two maids seemed to be at a loss and that he sense of crisis in Yang Kong’s heart had made him go crazy.

“If you all want to leave, then attack it with me.”

Li Yunmu had concealed to the side while listening to the conversation between Leng Yan and the two maids. Upon hearing about the way they were going to leave, his eyes flashed. He wanted to take a look at it, and he entered Leng Yan’s spatial ring and grabbed the restriction destroying seal. Without it, there was no possibility of Leng Yan and the others leaving the god ruins.

From the time they entered, Li Yunmu had felt nauseous after seeing Leng Yan’s face as he used hypocritical reasons to compel Jue Qingzi to act as his lackey. It was why he had awakened the ancient god’s corpse demon, then pretended to lose consciousness and took the key fragment from Leng Yan. He then gave it to Jue Qingzi to let him leave in order to conveniently settle the problem of Leng Yan and his group.

After coming to the night pearl small world, the first person he had encountered was Jue Qingzi. The talkative Jue Qingzi and the timid yet earnest and a fan of chicken ribs Yan Wanqiu as well as the twins who cultivated the secret technique and kept their mouths closed had left a good impression on him. Before them, he had believed that everyone from beyond the heavens was the same as yin son of heaven.

In the end, since Jue Qingzi and others gave him a good impression, Li Yunmu naturally wouldn’t let them get into trouble.

Another reason for his actions was that Ancient God Ru Shou was buried alive in the coffin, so his heart was filled with resentment. As a god of the Origin World, Li Yunmu wanted to offer the four disciples as a sacrifice to Ancient God Ru Shou.

chapters.title: Chapter 933 - Exterminated
chapters.body:
Chapter 933 - Exterminated

Chapter 933: Exterminated

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The black pupils of the corpse demon zeroed upon Leng Yan and the others, and the two black dragons on his shoulders spat out scorching black flames. A tyrannical presence exploded from his body, and he bellowed, revealing his sharp fangs. The corpse gas then concentrated around him.

Leng Yan looked at the corpse demon, slightly frowned, and his body exploded with peak tribulation passing stage strength. In his hand, he held a black seal paper with indecipherable runes scrabbled on it.

He flung the paper in front of him, and it exploded in the air, triggering a powerful pressure. It turned into a chicken egg-sized thunder ball and shot forward, toward the corpse demon’s body.

When the thunder ball dispersed, it turned into electricity flowing into the corpse demon’s physical body.

Li Yunmu, who was standing on the side, looked at the black seal transformed into a thunder ball thrown by Leng Yan and couldn’t help but smile. The thunder ball’s power couldn’t even injure a god, so how could it injure Ru Shou, whose body was at ancient god level?

Even if Leng Yan threw thousands of thunder balls, it would only tickle Ru Shou. With such an attack, he probably wouldn’t be able to last for even an instant.

Corpse demon’s gaze turned toward Leng Yan, and he furiously howled, infuriated by the thunder ball. He turned into a blur right away, and when he reappeared again, he was behind Leng Yan.

“Leng Yan, be a little careful!”

The two maids hiding at the back retreated without any hesitation.

Thud!

Leng Yan was thrown away and crashed into the cave’s wall like a kite whose string was cut off.

Yang Kong, who was originally standing to the side with a dumbfounded expression, retreated as he mumbled, “I told you to take the godhood and run away, but you all didn’t listen!”

“If you all continue to act like this, after I go out, I will ask godfather to wipe out the powers behind you.”

Leng Yan spat out a mouthful of blood and furiously howled at the maids and Yang Kong.

After saying that, he crawled up from the ground and looked at the corpse demon with a hint of anger in his eyes.

“You are nothing more than a corpse with an ancient god level physical body, so how powerful do you think you are!” he shouted out.

A pile of black seals appeared in Leng Yan’s hand out of nowhere, and he threw them toward the corpse demon. They all transformed into lightning balls in the air and flew straight at the corpse demon, where they ruptured and exploded with dazzling white light.

Upon seeing it, Leng Yan took out a faint red seal which he flung toward the corpse demon. He didn’t look at the two maids or Yang Kong when he attacked. Just a moment ago, he had spoken out ruthless words, and even if the three were somewhat afraid, they would definitely ally with him to attack the enemy.

The maids followed him because he was the young master and the future master of Leng Family and also had a voice in the Alliance. The two women themselves were the top talents of Leng Family’s subordinate power Bell Sound School, so as long as they followed Leng Yan, they would definitely obtain benefits.

And Yang Kong also had the same thinking.

But in the sealed area, the status of Leng Family’s young master wasn’t anything special for the three of them. They were independent people, and if they determined that they could not stop the corpse demon, neither one of them would go forward to keep Leng Yan safe.

But Leng Yan’s words terrified the maids and Yang Kong. They were deeply afraid that their actions would affect their sects and even their families. The most important thing, however, was that the restriction breaking seal to leave the god ruins was in Leng Yan’s possession.

After the three pondered it for a moment, they attacked. The maids, which came from the Bell Sound School and had curvy figures, swayed the small bells in their hands and released transparent sound waves.

Yang Kong patted his back, which was like a small mountain, with his hand, and five-colored smoke advanced toward the corpse demon.

The sound waves from the bells transformed into a rope in midair and twisted around the corpse demon. Leng Yan then threw the faint red seal in the air, which became samadhi fire.

The slowly floating five-colored smoke in that time passed through the coffin. Right after, the coffin disappeared, leaving only a pool of liquid behind.

The rope formed from the bell sounds twisted around the corpse demon, forming a transparent cocoon, and the samadhi flames passed through it to reach the corpse demon’s body. Then, from a single spark, they spread everywhere.

The five-colored smoke followed closely behind.

Li Yunmu watched the four’s attack with some interest. From how Leng Yan threw so many seals, it could be seen that Leng Family walked the path of using runes. Only by being rich and overbearing could he throw out a pile of black seals. And what concerned the faint red seal which could transform into samadhi power that emitted a god level presence, it could even cause some damage to the corpse demon.

As for Bell Sound School’s maids, they were similar to the holy daughters of Lakshmi City and walked the path of refining sound waves which could take the shape of any creature. However, the cultivation of the maids was at mid tribulation passing stage, so the creatures created by the sound waves were unable to injure the corpse demon, just only obstruct him.

The person who shocked Li Yunmu the most, however, was Yang Kong. Upon seeing him for the very first time, Li Yunmu had only felt that he was a lowly, wretched person with mid tribulation passing stage strength. Afterwards, when Ancient God Ru Shou was still lying dormant, he had already noticed that something was wrong because of his good sixth sense.

Apart from that, the five-colored poisonous smoke concealed on his back was extremely formidable and already emitted the presence of divine laws.

The four people had wordlesly divided the work among themselves. The two maids used sound waves to trap the corpse demon, while Leng Yan and Yang Kong used their most formidable techniques to deal with him.

But even when the four of them joined together to subdue the corpse demon, they could only hinder him and not kill him. When Ru Shou was alive, he was an ancient god, so if his corpse demon was taken care of by a few tribulation passing stage youngsters, it would really be a miracle.

The corpse demon looked like a burning person at that moment, and the five-colored poisonous smoke was like a fuel to the samadhi fire, making it burn even more intensely.

A formidable pressure erupted from the corpse demon’s body and sent the samadhi fire and the five-colored poisonous smoke in all directions. Bits of them fell on the two maids and burned them without giving them time to respond.

They became ashes in just a few breaths.

Yang Kong’s eyes narrowed, and he tried to dodge the samadhi flame flying toward him. Yet as he took a step to the side, he felt an invisible wall obstructing him.

The flying samadhi flames then fell on Yang Kong’s protruding back and he burst into flames with continuous cracking sounds like a firework.

After that, only Leng Yan and Ru Shou were left in the god ruin. After shedding the fetters, the godhood buried in Ru Shou’s chest blossomed with golden light while metallic sparks rich with corpse poison flew toward Leng Yan.

He dodged the samadhi flame, but when he saw the sparks of golden light filled with black gas releasing god level pressure, his face instantly turned pale. He put his hand into his spatial ring to take out the restriction breaking seal to leave the damned god ruin.

The next instant though, he grew even paler, for he didn’t find the restriction breaking seal after fumbling inside the spatial ring for a few times.

The golden light filled with specks of black smoke pounced on him, completely enveloping his body. A miserable shriek left Leng Yan’s mouth, but that was it. The black smoke soon dispersed, leaving behind only a pile of dust on the ground.

chapters.title: Chapter 934 - Reborn
chapters.body:
Chapter 934 - Reborn

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 935 - Yin Qi
chapters.body:
Chapter 935 - Yin Qi

Chapter 935: Yin Qi

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In a palace in the night pearl small world, an enormous mirror was arranged, and it was rolling in the air like mercury. More than ten people concealed in black mist were standing on both sides of the mirror, and all of them were disciples of Yin Manor.

After a moment, the mirror’s surface began to roll, and something rushed out of it. A black shadow descended at the center of the main hall—two yin phoenixes were pulling a simple bronze chariot. Once it descended, a blonde coachman holding a golden whip looked all around and turned toward the veil over the coach.

“Young master, we have reached the night pearl small world,” he said respectfully.

After a moment, a languid voice of a man echoed from inside the chariot. “Finally? God father sent me to this night pearl small world in the Origin World to subdue the ancient god’s corpse demon. After I do that, I will take a trip to the Origin World and see where my disappointing younger brother was killed and by whom.”

The disciples of Yin Manor were kneeling on the ground on both sides, and they said in unison, “Greetings yin son of heaven.”

The white-faced coachman jumped from the chariot and pulled open the curtain from one side. A young man wearing a black gown with silk threads walked out of the chariot with a faint smile on his face.

He looked at the Yin Manor’s disciples kneeling in the surroundings and said with a smile, “What did you all call me just now?”

“Greetings yin son of heaven!”

Their loud voices echoed in the main hall, and a satisfactory smile appeared on Yin Qi’s face when he said, “Stand up. You all have been in this night pearl small world for so many years, have you found the traces of the god ruin hidden by the god father in that year?”

When he said that, a group of Yin Manor’s disciples standing at the back came to the front and knelt in front of Yin Qi. “Yin son of heaven, the god ruin buried by emperor monarch has been discovered.”

“Good, good, good.”

After hearing such good news right after coming to the night pearl small world, Yin Qi couldn’t control the excitement in his heart. He could sense that after Yin Hong’s death, the destiny of Yin Manor’s young master belonged to him. Because of that heavenly destiny descending on his body, he was even able to learn that there was an ancient god’s corpse demon in the night pearl small world.

“Since you have already discovered it, let’s go and take out the ancient god’s corpse demon.”

Being an influential person, Yin Qi prepared to return to the chariot right away.

Yet the expressions of the disciples of Yin Manor kneeling on the ground became unsightly at that moment, and they said with a stammer, “But someone… has already entered the god ruin, yin son of heaven.”

“Eh?”

When Yin Qi heard those words, his expression instantly changed, and he coldly snorted. The presence of a true immortal erupted from his body, enveloping the entire master hall.

The main hall’s temperature plummeted, and the faces of the disciples of Yin Manor turned paler under the pressure of a true immortal. None of them dared to utter another word.

Yin Qi looked at Yin Manor’s disciples kneeling on the ground as he asked in a gloomy voice, “Who dares to make a move towards my stuff?”

The leader of the Yin Manor’s disciples said, “It was discovered by Leng Family’s young master, who also invited me and Nine Palace’s disciples to make a trip there. The ancient god corpse demon suddenly awakened, and we left the god ruin without wasting time there. After coming out, we learned that Leng Yan had obtained the information from the alliance’s true immortal Yan Tian.”

When he said that, Yin Qi suddenly smiled without saying anything and pulled back his true immortal presence. As someone belonging to one of the larger powers of beyond the heavens, he had some understanding toward the relations between all powers.

Leng Family was considered one of the top powers as well. They walked the path of runes, and they also had a late stage great principal golden immortal in their clan.

Once Yin Hong died, god father chose Yin Qi to be the yin son of heaven, the young master of Yin Manor. This meant that his foundation was unstable and he couldn’t be extremely arrogant toward Leng Yan. He had to give him the amount of face expected of him.

However, Leng Family’s young master only had the strength of a late stage tribulation passing stage, so even safely escaping from the ancient god’s corpse demon would be considered as extremely lucky for him.

But even if Yin Qi couldn’t do anything to Leng Family , he could make a move on the Alliance’s true immortal Yan Tian. If he did not settle this matter, then no one would fear him, a newly promoted yin son of heaven.

The entire hall turned extremely quiet as Yin Qi contemplated. There was no sound in the area at all.

At that moment, a carefree voice echoed from outside, and a red figure dropped at the gate. Its excited voice seemed to be trying to curry favor.

“The sudden visit by yin son of heaven to the night pearl small world has made this Yan forget his manners.”

After saying that, the newcomer went to yin son of heaven and showed himself. He then looked at Yin Qi as he bowed down.

“Yin son of heaven had rushed through the trip, so this Yan arranged a proper hall for you to take a rest.”

The yin son of heaven looked at the true immortal Yan Tian with a cold light in his eyes and a disdainful smile on his face.

Every son of Yin Emperor had some strange traits. The previous yin son of heaven, Yin Hong was extremely cruel and enjoyed absorbing the vitality of virgin maidens, while the present yin son of heaven, Yin Qi, was innately paranoid and extremely shrewd.

Before he even took the position of yin son of heaven, there was a rumor in Yin Manor that if anyone touched any of his things, they would be devoured by a thousand devils and after dying, their skin would be used as a cushion chair. As if to make sure everyone understood it, the Yin Manor had countless cushions of human skin, all of which were from the people Yin Qi had killed.

Although Yan Tian didn’t know that the god ruin was created by Yin Emperor, he was still the one who had given its location to Leng Yan, which violated Yin Qi’s bottomline. In the eyes of the disciples of Yin Manor, regardless of how true immortal Yan Tian tried to curry favor with him, Yin Qi would wipe his soul and add him to his collection of human cushions.

But true immortal Yan Tian did not know that.

“Go rest? Yan Tian, do you know why I came to this night pearl small world? I came to subdue the ancient god’s corpse demon buried here by god father many years ago. That corpse demon was bestowed to me as a puppet by god father.

“But alas, I heard something from my subordinates… This god ruin was discovered by someone, and the key to the ruin was even divided among a number of people.

“Something which originally belonged to me has disappeared. Yan Tian, do you think that I would still be in a good mood to take a rest after that?” Yin Qi said while looking down on Yan Tian.

After straightening up and taking note of Yin Qi’s face, Yan Tian suddenly recalled that he had used the location of a god ruin in a transaction. He had exchanged it for Leng Yan’s promise that after he became the clan leader and one of those who control the Alliance, Yan Tian could also advance and gain the position of a great elder.

Apart from the rulers, the great elders were the highest power in the Alliance. The night pearl small world itself could be said to form a faction, and the position of a great elder could be considered as covering heaven with one hand.

But Yan Tian comforted himself that his luck could not be so bad that the location of the god ruin which he gave to Leng Yan would be the same one as the one of the corpse demon reared by the Yin Family.

“Yin son of heaven, what does your distinguished self want to say? I cannot understand it. If you want to find the nurturing ground left behind by the Yin Emperor, I will dispatch people of the night pearl small world to find it. As long as I find any information, it will reach you first.

chapters.title: Chapter 936 - Decisive Kill
chapters.body:
Chapter 936 - Decisive Kill

Chapter 936: Decisive Kill

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The hall was completely silent. Even the sound of a pin dropping could be heard clearly. There wasn’t the least bit of liveliness to be found.

Yan Tian looked at the newly promoted yin son of heaven being silent and began to panic in his heart. Although his position was very high in the night pearl small world, he was just a manager appointed by the Alliance. He was only a small fish in the Alliance of beyond the heavens. Moreover, he was a rogue cultivator without an enormous power backing him, so Yin Qi was an existence he couldn’t afford to offend. Not right then at the least.

In the silence, time seemed to have slowed down. Yan Tian, a true immortal, felt his heart grow heavier and heavier, and large beads of sweat began to form on his forehead.

“Yan Tian, what do you still want to investigate? Haven’t you already handed over the god ruins left behind by god father to Leng Family’s young master?

“Oh right, you are only a rogue cultivator without any foundation, who depended upon the support of the Alliance to become the manager of this small world, so naturally you want to continue crawling up. You wanted to curry favor with Leng Family’s young master, and to make him your backer was indeed a correct choice. That is all normal, but you should know that there are some people that you cannot offend,” Yin Qi said while absent-mindedly playing with the ring on his hand.

After hearing that, Yan Tian’s face turned deathly pale. He was just thinking that the god ruins which he gave out could not be the god ruins created by Yin Emperor. After all, if he did give away the god ruins created by Yin Emperor to Leng Yan, it would thoroughly offend Yin Qi, which would be a huge problem.

Leng Yan knelt down on the ground and anxiously said, “Please forgive me, yin son of heaven. At that time, when I gifted the god ruins to Young Master Leng, I didn’t know that it was created by Yin Emperor for your distinguished self. Otherwise, even if I had ten thousand times more courage, I wouldn’t dare to touch it!”

Yin Qi looked at Yan Tian, who was a true immortal like him, being so flustered and apologising with a shivering body, and he couldn’t help but sigh in his heart. Authority certainly had its benefits. Previously, even if he was Yin Hong’s brother, he still would have needed to be respectful to Yan Tian.

But right then, when the majority of true immortals saw him, they were the ones who needed to be respectful. It was all because he had become the young master of Yin Manor.

Yan Tian, who was kneeling on the ground without daring to move, felt somewhat bitter. The reason why he had gifted the god ruins to Leng Yan was because he wanted to advance by another step in the Alliance and obtain even more resources to become a golden immortal. Yet who would have known that the god ruins he chose would surprisingly be the one created by Yin Emperor.

Back then, the Origin World was not sealed, and Yin Emperor was an emperor monarch with the cultivation of a great principal golden immortal who a normal member of the Alliance. But right now, Yin Emperor had become a quasi sage with whom few people could contend.

If Yin Qi killed Yan Tian, the Alliance couldn’t possibly find trouble with Yin Manor. Leng Family also wouldn’t stick out and offend the Yin Emperor. At that moment, if Yan Tian wanted to live, he could only acknowledge his mistakes and push his position as low as possible.

“You cannot use not knowing as an excuse, for Yin Manor is also in the Alliance. The god ruins in the small worlds cannot be entered without using the secret key specific to them. All secret keys are dropped in various corners of the small world and need to be dug out, but you directly handed over the secret key to Leng Yan in order to curry favor with him.”

Yin Qi paused after saying that. He looked at Yan Tian, whose body was shivering, and then continued.

“While it isn’t wrong for a rogue cultivator like you to try and curry favor with a larger power, your problem is your terrible luck. You passed on the information of the wrong god ruins to Leng Yan, so…”

Yan Tian had his head lowered and all he could see was a pair of shoes, but after hearing the pause in the speech, he raised his head to look at Yin Qi’s smiling face as well as the fingertip pointing toward the space between his eyes.

“My Yin Manor lacks a true immortal ghost, you remedy that problem.”

After he said that, Leng Yan’s eyes turned lifeless, and his body turned into ashes that fell on the ground without any sound. The next moment, an exceptionally formidable soul appeared in the domain surrounding Yin Qi with constant roars.

After a while, the disciples of Yin Manor in the hall began to shout one phrase.

“Formidable yin son of heaven, formidable yin son of heaven!”

“Let’s go, we will go to those god ruins and see how formidable that ancient god’s corpse demon is,” Yin Qi languidly said. His figure flickered then, and he moved to the chariot.

The white-faced coachman lowered the curtain, sat down on the board, and used the golden whip toward the two yin phoenixes. They turned into a blur and rose into the air as the disciples of Yin Manor followed one after another.

In the mountain cave, Li Yunmu looked at the corpse demon on the ground with a puzzled expression. According to the system, a new soul was born in Ru Shou’s body, and he didn’t intend to wipe it out. Yet when he tried to pull out the godhood from the corpse demon’s chest, the corpse demon sat down on the ground in terror like a three-year-old child and… began to wail.

Li Yunmu felt quite awkward. How could anyone say that the person before him was an ancient god with matchless majesty in his previous life? The corpse demon was surprisingly sitting on the ground and wailing.Visit on our AllNovel

It was completely out of the ordinary!

Fortunately, Ancient God Ru Shou had handsome features and was not a muscled man with nine heads. If he had been a muscular man, Li Yunmu would have immediately turned around and left the god ruins regardless of whether the person had any potential or not.

After a long time, Ancient God Ru Shou choked down the sobs, and tears stopped flowing out of his eyes. Li Yunmu extended his hand then, and divine light flew out of it to strike Ru Shou. Before he could start crying again, the divine light entered his glabella and produced a spell seal, which made him lose consciousness.

The tortoise spell seal was given to Li Yunmu by Yan Wanqiu. It was one of the lowest level cultivation secrets of Goumang Real World, and it was used when foundation stage cultivators were unable to release their energy or were underwater. After obtaining it, the system had reversed its effects.

In his hands, the new tortoise seal spell could seal the person without injuring their soul, which was what made it the most suitable way to deal with Ancient God Ru Shou.

Li Yunmu instantly went to Ancient God Ru Shou’s side, and his left hand passed through his chest to take the godhood hidden within. Once he brought his hand out, the godhood appeared in the mountain cave. The entire space seemed to have frozen, and faint golden threads floated in the air.

“Since we have taken out Ru Shou’s godhood, the metal attributes in the space have begun to gather around it. It really is powerful. There shouldn’t be any difference between using power of belief and using godhood to become a god, but to me, it seems like there’s an enormous difference. Godhood seems much more formidable than power of belief.”

[Your words are correct. Although power of belief can allow a half god to become a god, such a god would be no match for a god who used godhood. After all, godhoods contain laws of grand daos and allow gods to obtain enlightenment from time to time.

[Those who become gods using power of belief find it extremely difficult to gain any comprehension from heaven and earth in the future. Thus, the gods created from power of belief walk the path of refining bloodline ability,] the system explained in Li Yunmu’s mind.

“Then what’s with the rumor in the Origin World that there wasn’t any difference between the two!” Li Yunmu said with suspicion.

chapters.title: Chapter 937 - Scam
chapters.body:
Chapter 937 - Scam

Chapter 937: Scam

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

[Every world has three thousand grand daos, so the godhood congealed from them can also only number to three thousand. The direction I chose back then was wrong.

[I gave out three thousand godhoods in the beginning, so there were no more godhoods, and when the heirs of some ancient gods wanted to become gods, the power of belief just happened to arrive in the Origin World and they discovered its use. The five master gods also proclaimed publicly that there was no difference in gods created using godhoods and those who become gods using power of belief.

[Everyone believed it so much that the falsehood has survived until now. At that time, I hadn’t discovered the dangers of power of belief, so I also didn’t refute it.]

Li Yunmu did not reply. Using power of belief to become a god seemed like a better choice since only only needed sufficient amount of power of belief and wouldn’t have to pass the nine tribulations like the people of the Goumang Real World to become an immortal. But when all was said and done, those who became gods using power of belief were false gods whose strength could not compare to that of the gods who became such using godhood.

If the gods of the Origin World were told that using godhood would make them stronger than using power of belief, every one of them would probably snort disdainfully. The knowledge that the two were equal had been with them for countless years, so it had long ago become a fact in their hearts.

“Can you break down one-fifth of this metal attribute godhood? I want it for Jue Qingzi,” Li Yunmu said while transporting the metal attributed godhood to the system.

After a moment, a pearl-sized golden ball appeared in his hand. It was releasing a dazzling radiance, but it didn’t manifest abnormal changes like when it was full.

[Do you really intend to hand over this one-fifth of the metal-attributed godhood to that youngster? You should know that although he has a good moral character, he is still someone from the Goumang Real World. Once the two worlds begin to battle, you will be enemies. Are you really willing to raise his strength? What exactly are you thinking?] the system demanded.

It greatly loathed the Goumang Real World.

Life was good when the two worlds were drifting through the void, but once the Goumang Real World encountered them, the two began to fight. The Goumang Real World even used power of belief to cause internal strife in the Origin World and wore down its strength.

The system could see Jue Qingzi’s kind nature, but it still did not approve of Li Yunmu’s methods. Using the Origin World’s godhood to amplify the strength of someone from the Goumang Real World would be an action of an idiot.

“You think bestowing one-fifth of the metal-attributed godhood on Jue Qingzi isn’t a good idea? But I don’t think so. First, I have an agreement to use the godhood for Jue Qingzi with Yan Wanqiu. From her mouth, we learned about the cultivation system of the Goumang Real World, which made us decide to reform the world. You should understand that once this reform succeeds, the crisis of the Origin World will be resolved.

“Compared to that, one-fifth of the godhood could only allow five people to become immortals, which isn’t much. Five immortals won’t have much influence on the general situation.

“Second, the Goumang Real World uses god ruins to strengthen their younger generation, so why should we not collaborate with Jue Qingzi to obtain the godhoods of this small world and kidnap the younger generation of his world to increase the laws of grand daos of our world?”

After those words, a sinister smile appeared on Li Yunmu’s face.

The system thought for a minute about what he said. It thought it understood what he was trying to say, but still asked suspiciously, [You mean you plan to bring the cultivators of the small world to consolidate the laws of grand daos of the Origin World? But that’s only what you think. Would Jue Qingzi really agree to that? Just a moment ago, when you asked about the cultivation methods of the Goumang Real World, his first thought was to self-detonate.]

Li Yunmu collected Ancient God Ru Shou into his heavenly world through his palm. Once a hole opened at the hollow of his palm, the constant chatter of fifteen gods could be heard through the large gate. They were babbling like crazy lunatics, but when Ru Shou fell next to the box, the fifteen gods sealed within instantly became silent. They sensed the presence of ancient god from Ru Shou’s body.

“Where did this ancient god come from? He has surprisingly lost consciousness…”

“He seems to have fallen from outside, hisss… Did this bastard’s cultivation reach ancient god realm?!”

“We can’t get out, we can’t get out. With him in ancient god realm, how will clan patriarch rescue us!”

The door of the heavenly world slowly closed, and Li Yunmu calmly said, “I’m not thinking of collaborating with Jue Qingzi. He is a stubborn person and not pragmatic. Instead, I will collaborate with Yan Wanqiu, and she will agree. Although her strength is lower, she can persuade Jue Qingzi. She is a very opinionated person.”

Li Yunmu didn’t wait for the system’s reply and directly used the restriction destroying ring to leave the god ruins. White light flashed, and he found himself standing on the platform halfway up the mountain. The red-crowned cranes were in front of him.

Jue Qingzi looked at Li Yunmu, who had appeared out of nowhere, and suspiciously asked, “All dead?”

Yan Wanqiu threw the chicken leg on the ground and disdainfully said, “Naturally they are dead. Li Yunmu had gone to take care of them, so how could Leng Yan’s group still be alive? But it is better that they are dead; otherwise, if left alive, they would try to harm us.

“Senior apprentice brother, you must remember, our Profound Sword Pavilion doesn’t owe anything to Leng Yan. And this time, Leng Yan gave us the key fragment to let us leave first. His group died because of their own greed.”

Jue Qingzi nodded without saying anything to her words. Yan Wanqiu jumped off the red-crowned crane and arrived in front of Li Yunmu with an extended small hand.

Her eyes were shaking as she asked, “What about the thing you promised?”

After seeing Yan Wanqiu’s expression, Li yunmu directly took out the golden ball. She took it, and the pleasant surprise on her face faded away.

“How can it be so small? Can it really help senior apprentice brother become a god?” she asked with some dissatisfaction.

“It is more than enough. Not only can it help Jue Qingzi become an immortal, it will also help you and the twins to become gods. Frankly speaking, this is only one-fifth of the godhood.

“When we made our deal, I had promised to give you godhood, but hadn’t specified the amount. I am a god of the Origin World, however, so I naturally cannot help you people of the Goumang Real World increase your strength without any reason,” Li Yunmu calmly said.

“That’s also right. With the transfer of godhood, the agreement between us is concluded.”

Yan Wanqiu put the golden ball into her spatial ring and returned to sit on the red-crowned crane.

“Since this is the case, we will part ways. Li Yunmu, you must remember to leave this small world quickly. If the people of the Alliance discover you, they will send someone to kill you.

“Although the highest cultivation allowed in the Origin World is only that of a true immortal, it won’t be like that forever. If you went on a killing spree in this small world, then once the seal of the Origin World is removed, the Alliance would definitely send people to kill you, and there would be elder ancestors who have a cultivation of great principal golden immortal among them.”

When Yan Wanqiu finished talking, she began to nibble on another chicken leg while her other hand patted the red-crowned crane.

However, Li Yunmu released his presence to pressure the red-crowned crane, and it shuddered. The best did not dare to flap its wings.

chapters.title: Chapter 938 - Looting Together
chapters.body:
Chapter 938 - Looting Together

Chapter 938: Looting Together

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Yan Wanqiu looked at Li Yunmu, and a light flashed through her gaze.

“I have already told you all the cultivation methods of Profound Sword Pavilion which I know. I don’t know anything else,” she said slowly.

Jue Qingzi and the twins also looked at Li Yunmu with a hint of alarm in their heart. After entering the god ruins, Leng Yan’s group had been killed.

It did not matter that he was dead though, since as long as they did not involve themselves with Li Yunmu anymore, Leng Family would not be able to place the blame on them. They also weren’t the only ones who had entered the god ruins, so there were also the disciples of Yin Manor and Nine Palaces who could be used as excuses.

Once Yan Wanqiu and Li Yunmu’s agreement had been concluded, the matter should be considered as over. They should all go their separate ways, but for some reason, he prevented them from leaving!

“Dao brother, we will quickly return to the Goumang Realm World, so you shouldn’t stop us,” Jue Qingzi slowly said from the side.

Li Yunmu shook his head as he looked at the nervous expressions of Yan Wanqiu and the others. A smile appeared on his face and he said, “I have stopped you all not for the cultivation secrets, but rather because….”

Before he could finish speaking, Yan Wanqiu interrupted him. “I don’t like you.”

Li Yunmu shot a glance at Yan Wanqiu. His expression remained calm, but a hint of embarrassment entered his voice. “What the hell are you thinking? I wanted to ask whether you all have the intention of joining me in robbing others?”

After hearing his words, Yan Wanqiu was slightly startled, and her nervous expression faded away. She turned to look at Li Yunmu and loudly asked, “What did you say just now? Robbing?”

“That’s right, robbing. We should go and loot the other god ruins in this night pearl small world and even the other cultivators who possess godhoods. I will take 90%, while you will get 10%. What do you say?” Li Yunmu offered with a smile.

Although the night pearl small world wasn’t very large, it was not that small either. In such an area, who could say how many god ruins were present. If Li Yunmu could get his hands on them, he could start the reform of the Origin World as soon as he returned.

When Jue Qingzi heard Li Yunmu’s words, he heaved a sigh of relief. Previously, when they were in the god ruins, the reason why he had agreed to Li Yunmu’s advice of using the key fragment to leave was because of Yan Wanqiu’s words. They had allowed him to realize that he had indeed acted foolishly in the previous matters.

The favor which he owed was already repaid, so Leng Yan’s life and death no longer had any relation to him.

But right then, Li Yunmu was speaking about taking all the god ruins as well as cultivators of the Alliance in the small world. Such looting would offend the entire Alliance, and if someone from the Alliance found out that Jue Qingzi and the others had participated in it, then not only would they be killed, even the entire Profound Sword Pavilion would be buried alongside them.

“Dao brother… please don’t make jokes like that. We are people of the Goumang Real World and cannot follow you in doing such immoral acts. We won’t participate in this matter.”

After he finished talking, Jue Qingzi looked at Yan Waniqu and saw that she still had an astonished expression on her face. Upon seeing her expression, he secretly heaved a sigh of relief. Her expression showed that she also wouldn’t agree on participating in such a matter.

Yan Wanqiu frowned and asked in a trembling voice, “If we don’t participate, what will you do?”

Li Yunmu saw that Yan Wanqiu and the others weren’t willing to participate, which was just as he expected. Whether for good or bad, they were people of the Goumang Real World and if they really colluded with him, it wouldn’t be any different from betraying their world. The reason why he wanted to collaborate with them was only to make his task slightly more convenient.

But just as he was about to open his mouth, the system’s voice echoed in his brain with a laugh. [Fifty kilometers away, there are people of Yin Manor advancing over here. Seems like there’s a bigshot among them.]

After hearing those words, Li Yunmu’s gaze flickered. He looked at Jue Qingzi and the others and he said with a profound smile, “Since you don’t agree, then I can only say it is a pity. I won’t force you all, so we will part ways here. If brother you regret it later, you can follow in this direction to look for me.”

While saying that, Li Yunmu pointed in the southwest direction. Jue Qingzi nodded and lightly patted the red-crowned crane, which rose and flew in the direction of Yin Manor’s disciples. Soon, it turned into a black dot that disappeared in the distance.

[You intentionally pointed toward the southwest so that Jue Qingzi and others chose the direction of Yin Manor’s disciples. You are really treacherous,] the system said with a sigh, seeing through Li Yunmu’s small trick straight away.

Li Yunmu had told Jue Qingzi that he would advance southwest so Jue Qingzi and the others would choose the opposite direction in order to avoid getting into trouble with him. And that direction was precisely the one that the bigshot of Yin Manor took to reach the god ruins. Once the two groups came into contact, Yin Manor’s bigshot wouldn’t let them go before learning about what had happened with the godhood.

Afraid of being tortured for interrogation, Yan Wanqiu definitely wouldn’t sit still and would come to find him with Jue Qingzi.

“It is good. If I want to empty out all the god ruins of this small world quickly and abduct the tribulation passing stage youngsters in passing, I will definitely need help of someone from the Goumang Real World.

“And rather than looking for anyone else, it would be better to work with Yan Wanqiu again,” Li Yunmu said unhurriedly while looking at the direction that Jue Qingzi and the others had picked. “But until they are forced to their limits, they wouldn’t collaborate with me.”

After saying that Li Yunmu began to proceed toward the southwest, slowly moving through the sky.

On the other side, in the sky to the northeast, Jue Qingzi and the others were riding on red-crowned cranes toward the headquarters of the Alliance. On the way, Yan Wanqiu turned to look back from time to time and heaved a sigh of relief when she did not see anyone.

When she turned her head toward the front once more, she said to Jue Qingzi, who had a concerned expression on his face, “Senior apprentice brother, Li Yunmu provided a godhood for us to become immortals, so it’s better if we return to the Alliance’s headquarters. Otherwise, if we remain behind, trouble will come knocking on our door. But what a pity, Li Yunmu was a little petty-minded and only gave us one-fifth of the godhood. He is really stingy.”

“Junior apprentice sister, it’s already pretty good that Brother Li Yunmu gave us the godhood. If he hadn’t, there was nothing you or I could have done. But doing this kind of thing once is enough. If we did it again and again, then we would not even have our corpses for burying,” Jue Qingzi said with a lingering fear. When the matter of collaboration appeared in his mind, he felt a chill go down his spine once more.

It was a goodbye for then and forever.

That was the only thought in Jue Qingzi’s mind.

Yan Wanqiu took out a chicken leg from her spatial ring and began to slowly eat it as she said, “Originally, I wanted the complete godhood. It might be able to support Profound Sword Pavilion so we could also become a major power in the Alliance. Our situation would become different then and we wouldn’t need to ask others to provide us more slots in small worlds like this.”

After saying that, Yan Wanqiu’s large eyes began to roam around, and she leaned over near Jue Qingzi’s ear. “How about we don’t return to the real world and go to loot others. Li Yunmu’s words were correct. It is easier to steal resources, and we wouldn’t need to worry about it with him around.”
