All the ordinary godhoods were divided into four portions while the ownership of the godhoods of ancient gods would depend on everyone’s ability.

Each of the four immortals then chose ten godhoods to be left behind for the tribulation passing cultivators to contest. After negotiation, they dispatched disciples to explain the rules to the three thousand tribulation passing cultivators.

When they heard about the forty godhoods, the complexions of the cultivators turned ashen. But even if they were angry, they didn’t dare to voice it out. If only forty were left for three thousand cultivators, most people wouldn’t receive even any dregs.

Everyone gathered together then. They were sure that the only way out for them was to wait until the true son of the Alliance arrived. He alone could be their support.

The Alliance could contend against the four emperor factions, and its true son was similar to the young masters of the four factions. The most crucial point was that the forest had appeared in the night pearl small world, which was under the management of the Alliance. As long as the true son appeared, the three thousand cultivators could rely on him and fight for the godhoods without any apprehensions.

Even if they would need to pay a share after the matter, it would still be better than submitting to the four emperor factions who only left forty godhoods for everyone else.Read more chapter on AllNovel

The sky turned black from white in the night pearl small world, and stars began to shine high above. A strong gale blew from a distant place, and it had an immortal presence within it.

It startled all the birds and beasts, while the three thousand cultivators stood up to look. A hint of happiness appeared on their faces when they realized that the true son of the Alliance had finally arrived.

Li Yunmu, who was standing on the ancient tree in the forest, also took note of the strong gale, and a hint of astonishment appeared on his face.

“What is this? Only one person came from the Alliance! Do they only want to watch from the sidelines?” he asked with suspicion.

That was completely different from what Yan Wanqiu had said.

When they were in the mountain cave, she had shared the plan of using the godhoods to lure in the tribulation passing cultivators of the night pearl small world. She also pointed out that a peak disciple of the Goumang Real World was managing the night pearl small world for the Alliance.

Almost everything went as expected. After Li Yunmu created the forest and spread the news, the four emperor factions and three thousand cultivators were attracted over.

From the people Yan Wanqiu had told Li Yunmu about, only the true son of the Alliance hadn’t arrived.

Although many factions had united to form the Alliance, its main backbone was the lineage of Da Luo patriarch. Every generation’s heirs were called true sons, and the present generation had seven true sons.

One of the true sons was responsible for managing the night pearl small world. Thus, Yan Wanqiu had inferred that he would come to the forest.

Once something important was discovered, he would always come together with the four true immortal managers. But what concerned the four managers of the night pearl small world, one of them had been killed by Yin Qi, while the remaining three were dealt with when they went after Jue Qingzi.

Without the three true immortals, the true son of the Alliance should have brought an army from the Goumang Real World once he realized that there was going to be a fight over numerous godhoods.

But against Li Yunmu’s expectations, the true son of the Alliance came unaccompanied by anyone. Even if it seemed illogical.

The violent gale that could be seen on the horizon outside reached the location of the three thousand cultivators within a flash. When it descended, a clear figure was revealed. It belonged to a young man wearing a golden gown and surrounded by a domain of a starry river, which had countless flickering points inside. After careful observation, it could be seen that each star was a piece of treasure.

A muscular man wielding a cudgel made from wolf teeth revealed a cheerful expression. A smile appeared on his face when he saw the youth, and he respectfully said, “Respectful greetings, True Son Duo Bao.”

True Son Duo Bao nodded, then asked with a calm expression, “En, what’s the situation here?”

The muscular man narrated all of what had happened, then finally came to the point where the four factions had dispatched people to tell them about leaving behind forty godhoods for the three thousand cultivators.

When he said that, True Son Duo Bao snorted as he looked at the palace hall at the edge of forest and said in an unpleasant tone, “Hmph, the four emperor factions have resorted to tyrannically abusing people. They even dare to behave atrociously in the territory of my Alliance!”

As he said those words, a projection shot out from the starry river domain surrounding True Son Duo Bao’s body. The stars were all emitting the pressure of numerous treasures, and it was enough to make the space distort.

Moments later, peak stage true immortal presence spread out from True Son Duo Bao’s body. It was followed by various events in the palace hall.

Faint golden light came from the bodies of the monks sitting on the ground, and a shadow spread out in the air behind the buddha son who had the lotus imprint on his head. The shadow transformed into an enormous projection of Buddha, whose appearance was exactly the same as that of the buddha son.

One after another, seals, who were on the brink of turning illusory, flew out from the bodies of taoists and formed an enormous ‘Tao’ symbol, from which an ancient and formidable pressure spread out.

Rays of light flew out from the pure white palace which spread out midair to form the projection of a spell formation. Great danger existed between the lines.

Finally, waves of spirits flew out from the palace surrounded by yin fog. They spiraled and howled in the air among two true immortal stage fiends.

Once True Son Duo Bao made his move, the four emperor factions immediately reacted. It was completely different from before, when the three thousand cultivators appeared at the edge of the forest.

At that time, the four emperor factions didn’t have any reaction. They didn’t put the three thousand cultivators in their eyes, even if they had an almost dominating advantage in terms of numbers.

chapters.title: Chapter 951 - Forest Opens
chapters.body:
Chapter 951 - Forest Opens

“You all really think that this night pearl small world is your home!” True Son Duo Bao said with a profound expression while looking at the four projections that had sprung up from all directions. Yet the three thousand cultivators stood behind him, allowing him to instantly surpass the four emperor factions.

“Although this region belongs to the Alliance, it is still a property of the Goumang Real World. Now that the Origin World has opened, the war that will decide the life or death of both worlds will soon erupt.

“Does your Alliance want to hog this treasure land to itself? Moreover, which of the four emperor factions hasn’t been a member of the Alliance before? This treasure land may also have treasures of the four factions concealed within it.”

“Dao brother’s words are correct. My god father previously hid the corpse demon of an ancient god here, so why can’t this forest have treasures which the other factions hid inside it? True Son Duo Bao, I urge you to be a little more earnest. The Alliance cannot compare to its olden days.”

After hearing that, True Son Duo Bao didn’t get angry. He began to smile instead. He looked at the Nine Palaces’ young master and yin son of heaven, then slowly said, “Your Nine Palaces and Yin Manor really have some ability. Even if I let go of you all twisting words to force your logic, you surprisingly even dare to say that the Alliance cannot compare to its olden days.

“Now, let’s see whether your factions will dare to find trouble with the Alliance or not after I drive both of you away from here!”

After saying that, True Son Duo Bao turned toward the three thousand cultivators standing behind him and said with a wide smile, “You are all members of the Alliance, so join me to attack and expel the Nine Palaces and Yin Manor. Alliance will take responsibility for everything that happens here.”

“Alright!”

A cheerful expression appeared on the faces of the three thousand cultivators, and powerful presences erupted from their bodies. Among them, fragments of black fog flew out with a buzzing sound.

After careful observation, it could be seen that they were densely packed mosquitos. Their bodies were black with a bit of red at the tip of their rear part.

Icy mist flew from the body of another cultivator, which was filled with ice star points.

Everyone released their cultivation with full strength, and their powerful pressure fell on the four emperor factions, causing the four projections to scatter and turn increasingly more illusory.

A smile appeared on the face of True Son Duo Bao. He had rushed alone through the night pearl small world so as to not allow the other true sons to detect anything. After coming, the only reason why he dared to act mighty before others was because every single cultivator in the Alliance was under the banner of the Alliance, so even the rogue cultivators supported him.

After all, the only one who could contend against the four emperor factions was the Alliance’s true son.

Once the powerful pressure appeared, two cold snorts echoed from the yin domain and pure white palace hall as two silhouettes manifested themselves in front of others. Yin Qi wearing the black golden gown and Yao Mingwei wearing pure white clothes appeared in front of everyone with icy expressions.

They looked at the true son Duo Bao, and Yao Mingwei arrogantly said, “Dao Brother Duo Bao, do you really think that you can contend against the four emperor factions? Even with the three thousand cultivators standing behind you, you might not be able to win against the alliance of the four emperor factions!”

His words had a double-layered meaning. First, he directly opposed True Son Duo Bao’s authority, making it seem like he wanted to appropriate the forest for himself. After all, even if the four emperors did not get along, they would still join hands to contend against the Alliance.

The second intention was to threaten the three thousand cultivators. Even if True Son Duo Bao was standing by their side, they must still consider the difficulty of dealing with the four emperor factions’ alliance.

The three thousand cultivators did not say anything, while True Son Duo Bao coldly snorted. He turned toward the taoists and Buddha Clan, who had yet to say anything yet and spoke to them with a faint smile.

“Do the two dao brothers also want to ally with Nine Palaces and Yin Manor? I’ve been thinking that the number of godhoods in the forest was extremely large and so I was feeling great pressure and wanted to ask the two dao brothers to help share the burden.

“But from what I’m hearing now, it seems that the two dao brothers surprisingly established an alliance with Nine Palaces and Yin Manor…”

The moment True Son Duo Bao finished speaking, the lotus imprint on buddha son’s head released a golden light, and he shot a glance toward the wicked Yin Qi and said with a faint smile, “My Buddha Clan could never cooperate with evil beings. True Son Duo Bao is overthinking things.”

“We taoists also have the same opinion. We aren’t colluding with people who turn their back on their masters and ancestors. Taoism and Buddhism as upright forces will naturally ally with the Alliance to help True Son Duo Bao share the pressure.”

While Yin Qi listened to their words, his expression grew colder and colder. Yao Mingwei, who stood a bit away from him, turned gloomy, and his gaze flickered around, making it hard for people to guess his thoughts.

True Son Duo Bao looked at the two people with an expression that said that victory was in his hands. While rushing over from the Goumang Real World, he had obtained the intelligence that the four emperor factions had already established themselves outside the forest, and he immediately began to make plans to maximize his benefits.

The three thousand cultivators gathered nearby would naturally stand on his side, since even if they were numerous, they did not dare to stand up against the four emperor factions. Moreover, the four emperor factions were not on friendly terms among themselves.

On top of that, Yin Manor’s newly promoted yin son of heaven was riding roughshod over people and had even killed a true immortal manager. It was a slap on Duo Bao’s face, so while rushing over, he began to think of methods to divide the four emperor factions.

If the four emperor factions let go of their hatred for one another and they collaborated with each other to snatch the forest, then the majority of the godhoods would be taken by them. To not let that happen, Duo Bao decided to provoke the Yin Manor and Nine Palaces, then ally with taoists and Buddha Clan. He wanted to maximize his benefits at any cost.

“So, yin son of heaven and young master of Nine Palaces, will you retreat or not? If you don’t retreat by yourself, then I and two dao brothers will help you retreat,” True Son Duo Bao said and burst out laughing.

At the same time, the young master of taoists and buddha son also looked at the two to check their reactions. If they did not retreat, they wouldn’t mind making a move. In any case, they were enemies.

Yin Qi laughed. From the moment he became the yin son of heaven, it was the first time he had faced such a situation. Usually, people didn’t dare to talk to him like that.

He turned toward the master of Nine Palaces and slowly said, “Dao brother, we cannot contend against the Alliance moving together with taoists and buddhists. It seems like we don’t need to stay here anymore.”

After he said that, the yin domain forming a square palace dispersed and returned to surround everyone’s bodies. Yin Qi flung his large sleeve, then threw out the yin phoenixes and chariot which he entered.

The young master of Nine Palaces looked at True Son Duo Bao, then entered the pure white palace with a cold snort.

Upon seeing the two powers about to retreat, a smile appeared on True Son Duo Bao’s face. He was about to turn to discuss the partition of godhoods in the forest with taoists and buddhists when the cloud formed from the energy of heaven and earth made a loud sound, then collapsed and was sucked into the middle of the forest.

The spell formation formed from the grand daos on the ancient tree also retreated. Once it withdrew, the barrier around the forest loosened until it was about to completely disappear.

“Damn it, it didn’t open earlier or later! No, it just had to open now!”

True Son Duo Bao’s expression turned gloomy. Yin Manor and Nine Palaces still hadn’t retreated, and he and the two powers he had allied with hadn’t discussed the partition of godhoods.

Yet the forest opened, making the hearts of everyone become restless.

Everyone had entered the night pearl small world in order to obtain a godhood. The disciples of all factions had formed parties to explore the god ruins, and the forest was a land of treasures. It even possessed an ancient tree filled with godhoods.

The barrier through which only golden immortals could pass around it had dispersed, so all the cultivators got ready to rush forward.

chapters.title: Chapter 952 - Complete Mess
chapters.body:
Chapter 952 - Complete Mess

True Son Duo Bao saw a hint of madness appear in the eyes of the three thousand cultivators and couldn’t help but snigger inwardly while thinking of a method to deal with the situation. He turned toward the numerous cultivators before speaking in a cold tone.

“Since the forest opened and you all nominated me as your leader, then I will naturally share a portion of those several hundred godhoods with you. But you should know what you cannot take! If someone secretly takes something they shouldn’t take, then I, Duo Bao, will tell you now that the information of all the cultivators who entered the night pearl has been recorded. I am not investigating you all, but if I find something I shouldn’t find, you will be on your own.”

After he said that, the eyes of some people among the three thousand cultivators dimmed as they began to carefully consider his words.

True Son Duo Bao then turned toward the taoist young master and buddha son and unhurriedly said, “The forest suddenly opened, and we haven’t properly discussed the division of godhoods. Since this is the case, let’s allow the three thousand cultivators to pick the godhoods. We have to focus on dealing with the two of them.”

While saying that, True Son Dao Buo turned toward the chariot pulled by yin phoenixes and the pure white palace. Once the forest suddenly opened, the Nine Palaces and Yin Manor, who were previously about to retreat, chose to stick around.

The lotus imprint on the head of the buddha son flickered, and he smiled, which made a pair of dimples appear on his face. “We have to take this way. The people of Yin Manor and Nine Palaces aren’t leaving, so they will certainly create some trouble. Jiu Zhen, take a few younger brothers and sisters to pluck the godhoods while others stay with me to expel the people of Yin Manor.”

A middle-aged man flew down from the platform. He was dressed in simple clothes and holding a fly whisk in his hand.

“Liu Qing, you also take a few disciples with you to follow the dao brothers to pluck the godhoods. The remaining disciples will follow me to drive out the traitors who betrayed their master.”

A response came from both factions, and a few figures flew in front of the three thousand cultivators before the gradually weakening barrier of the forest.

Buddha son’s attention then turned to the chariot pulled by yin phoenixes. He placed his hands in front of his chest and formed a lotus imprint. The domain surrounding his body spread out with waves of immortal presence, which enveloped half of the sky and filled it with numerous buddhas as the sound of buddhist scriptures being chanted echoed from all directions.

A halo appeared behind the buddha son, and wherever he stepped, the projection of a lotus appeared as he advanced toward the chariot.

“Hmph, baldy, I am not afraid of you!” Yin Qi said in a disdainful tone while lying in the chariot and watching buddha son’s domain expanding as buddhist scriptures were being chanted.

When Yin Emperor was an ordinary cultivator, he walked the path of life and death grand dao until he comprehended the daos of Yin and Yang. Afterwards, when he became an immortal, he perceived his innate skill and focused on comprehending the dao of death.

It allowed him to create the yin domain which could steal the live spirits and turn them into vengeful spirits for his use. Because of this, he was expelled from his sect and was chased by all the peak powers, among which Buddha Clan was at the forefront. They had put him in deadly situations more than once.

Afterwards, Yin Emperor entered the Alliance to be able to take a breather. He was part of it until he became an emperor monarch and experienced the war with the Origin World. After that, he left to establish Yin Manor and advanced to quasi sage, becoming another peak power of the Goumang Real World.

The Buddha Clan renounced their hunt for Yin Emperor, but because of the shared history, the disciples of Yin Manor and Buddha Clan viewed each other as enemies.

Yin Qi appeared out of the chariot with the yin domain supporting him from behind. There were countless miserable and resentful spirits within it, and it covered half the sky, just like the domain of the numerous buddhas. Waves of immortal presence emitted from the bodies of the two men as they turned into a blur and exchanged blows.

Yao Mingwei slowly walked out from the pure white palace while looking at True Son Duo Bao and the taoist young master with a faint smile on his lips. “This forest pened at such an unsuitable time. I and Brother Yin have yet to withdraw, so it seems like we must have a round between us.”

After he said that, a simple broken spell flag appeared in his hand, and he threw it toward them. The spell flag divided into countless spell flags and entered the ground, from where they created waves of spell formations. There were more than several hundred of them, but the expressions of Duo Bao and the taoist young master didn’t change even after seeing them. They just used their own means to attack.

On the other side, the light created by the several hundred grand daos pulled back to the ancient tree in the forest, and the naturally existing barrier completely disappeared. But True Son Duo Bao had warned the three thousands cultivators about greedy, which wiped it from their hearts, and they followed the Buddha Clan and taoists in an orderly manner.

Together, they entered the forest which previously only seemed to be a hundred meters wide. Yet from the outside, none of them could see inside. A thick mist drifted around the place where the three thousand cultivators stood.

Soon though, one of them hardened their resolve and took a breath. Immediately after, he felt that the air in his mouth was filled with a large amount of spiritual energy.

When the barrier was closed, the spiritual energy of the earth had gathered above the forest, forming a thick cloud. The three thousand cultivators, who were staying outside, could sense the thick energy of heaven and earth, but not take it. But when they entered the forest, although the spiritual energy wasn’t different from before, it materialized into liquid, which was quite terrifying.

Given the thickness of the spiritual energy of heaven and earth, the forest could be considered as a blessed land.

Apart from the peak powers, none of the sects or factions behind the three thousand cultivators had a blessed land which could compare to this one. Upon realizing that, the taoists and disciples of Buddha Clan standing at the front revealed astonished expressions.

“This forest only seemed to be a hundred meters wide from the outside, but now three thousand cultivators have entered and there is still space. It is clear that this forest is a blessed land. The faint silhouette of the ancient tree can be seen before us, which can make people believe that it is not far away, but in reality, it is thousands of kilometers away. We must proceed carefully.”

“Dao brother’s words are correct. What do the three thousand dao friends have to say?”

Jiu Zhen and Liu Qing looked at the forest and settled the matters in a few words. Their final question for the three thousand cultivators was only in order to remind them not to act without thinking. The forest didn’t seem that large from the outside, but it was a blessed land, where they could not judge the distance accurately.

The forest was definitely a blessed land of a faction from the Goumang Real World. It might be dangerous to explore it, but with so many tribulation passing experts, they could definitely pass through it. The appearance of the forest in the night pearl small world had to be because of someone. An almighty must have mistakenly hidden it while still being part of the Alliance.

A forest concealed by an almighty was definitely dangerous, so a portion of cultivators might perish inside it. Thus, the two men reminded the three thousand cultivators about the dangers and warned them to not become restless, for it might spell their doom.

“We will properly follow after the two dao brothers.”

The three thousand cultivators spoke in unison. Everyone who had entered the forest understood that it wasn’t simple. In order to remain safe, they had to properly follow after the taoists and Buddha Clan.

chapters.title: Chapter 953 - Small World Within A World
chapters.body:
Chapter 953 - Small World Within A World

Jiu Zhen and Liu Qing walked in the front with vigilant expressions and domains surrounding their bodies as they looked in all directions. If anything seemed out of the ordinary, they would immediately open their domains and unleash their unique abilities.

The three thousand cultivators following behind them were also the same. They had congealed all their energy to defend against any sudden danger.

Yet even after they walked a thousand kilometers, they still didn’t encounter any dangers. Jie Zhen and Liu Qing were a little doubtful in their hearts. From the time they started walking, they hadn’t encountered any danger, which made their journey extremely easy.

After walking a thousand kilometers, the ancient tree’s silhouette became quite clear. They could even see the halo being emitted by the several hundred godhoods as they flickered in the air.

“Dao friend, it seems like the ancient tree isn’t very far away. We haven’t encountered any danger during the trip, so perhaps this forest was only a ruin that has been in the night pearl small world from the start.”

Faint light flickered through Jie Zhen’s eyes as runes began to rotate in his eyes. He looked extremely similar to God Shiva of the Origin World at that moment.

Once Jie Zhen opened his heavenly eyes, he looked at the forest and the ancient tree floating in the horizon, but he didn’t detect any restrictions or spell formations.

Liu Qing’s investigation also revealed the same result. Both of them confirmed that the forest had been part of the night pearl small world from the start, or perhaps it was a world fragment which hadn’t evolved yet and previously belonged to a real world.

It probably hadn’t appeared before because it was covered up by the world fragment.

The three thousand cultivators didn’t say anything, while those with the ability to use heavenly eyes continued to look all around. No one asked anything aloud.

After making a round, everyone approved of Jiu Zhen and Liu Qing’s words. They loosened their vigilance and only thought about how to divide the godhoods later. How many cultivators of the three thousand would be allowed by True Son Duo Bao to take a godhood?

Without realizing it, everyone walked the second half of the trip and arrived in front of the ancient tree. Once they reached it, Jie Zhen and Liu Qing were attracted by its brilliance. A dazzling light was blossoming around the godhoods hanging on the tree.

“Choose three among you who will come with us to pluck the godhoods from the ancient tree. The rest of you must vigilantly look around,” Jie Zhen said.

Although they had reached the ancient tree smoothly, they had to remain careful at the end of their journey. If they encountered some danger at the final junction, it was possible for them all to die without warning.

Three people walked out from the three thousand cultivators, but just as the five reached the ancient tree, whispers echoed behind them.

“You all still not climbing? There are several hundred gohoods there. If we can snatch a few of them, then not only can we transcend tribulation and become immortals, we could help ten true immortals to appear in our sect.”

“If you are not going to climb, then say so. I will do it myself and run away from this place after taking the godhoods. When hiding among so many people, I think we can escape.”

“This is a rare opportunity. We must certainly take it.”

The cultivators present on the scene were at the peak among the mortals, only one step away from comprehending a grand dao, transcending tribulation, and becoming immortals. Enticed by the voices, their ambitions, which had been extinguished, burst into flame once more.

When they thought about it, they weren’t only a few hundred tribulation passing powerhouses, but rather full three thousand of them. Given so many people, how many could the few factions investigate?

As long as the number of godhoods they snatched wasn’t too high, True Son Duo Bao wouldn’t find trouble with them.

Jie Zhen and Liu Qing felt something and looked back to see a hint of madness in the eyes of the three thousand cultivators. Their eyes were focused on the godhoods hanging on the ancient tree, and the two men cursed inwardly. When they were outside, True Son Duo Bao knew that there were some people among the three thousand cultivators who wanted to fish in troubled waters, so he had ruthlessly warned them, killing their ambitions.

But when they arrived in front of the ancient tree, it seemed like some of the cultivators hidden among the group fanned the flames once more. If the three thousand cultivators rushed forward, then even if the two men were disciples of a large faction, they would still be washed away by the tide.

The talkative cultivators had to be put to death.

The two snorted coldly, then pretended to be calm as they tracked three people who were making the noises and threw out cultivation techniques one after another. They were like rays of light which drilled into the cultivators’ glabella within an instant. The light in their eyes went out, and their physical bodies turned into ashes and disappeared.

“Hmph, who dares to mislead people with words, be a little careful. You might end up losing your life.”

Jie Zhen snorted, and a halo appeared behind his body as the projection of buddha took form.

The three thousand cultivators took note of how Jie Zhen and Liu Qing had attacked so quickly that the three cultivators who were talking died without detecting anything. Even though they were also tribulation passing experts like them, the disparity between them was extremely large. For a period of time, the ambitions, which had realighted in everyone’s hearts, were again wiped out.

Jiu Zhen and Liu Qing watched as everyone quieted down with palms covered in cold sweat. Once they saw that the storm had passed, they turned to look at the godhoods hanging on the branches, and a hint of greed appeared in their eyes. It wasn’t like they had never seen a godhood, but they had never seen so many of them together. As far as they could see, their entire field of vision was filled with sparkling divine light.

“Dao brother, how many godhoods are hanging on the ancient tree? Should we begin plucking them?” Liu Qing said, then raised his head and began to count the godhoods hanging overhead.

Jiu Zhen and the three tribulation passing experts also began to count earnestly. All of them represented different factions, so they naturally couldn’t trust the counting of the others.

Once the different factions confirmed the number of godhoods, they could begin plucking.

The five of them extended their hands to pick the godhoods flickering with divine light. But just as they reached out, the ancient tree seemed to have come alive, and countless branches began to tremble as they pulled back toward the trunk. At the same time, a cave opening appeared in the trunk. All the branches entered it like water.”Access webnovel.live if you like watching manga,comics.

“What is this thing?” Jiu Zhen asked lifelessly while looking at the opening on the trunk from which a weird presence came.

Liu Qing and the three thousand cultivators were also the same. They were startled after sensing the presence inside.

It was extremely familiar to them, just like the presence of the night pearl small world. It was a small world made from the world fragment of a former real world.

Those who obtained it could turn the fragment into their faction’s small world where they would become omnipotent like true gods. In the Goumang Real World, not even all peak powers could possess a small world. The Alliance had the highest number of small worlds, but they weren’t meant for people.

After a long time, everyone snapped back to reality and saw the ancient tree turn into a wooden pile with a large door hanging in front of them, with stars, sun, and moon wandering around.

“Damn it, it is surprisingly a world fragment!”

“How could a world fragment appear in the night pearl small world?”

“Didn’t you hear the words of Jiu Zhen and Liu Qing? They guessed that this forest is an object of a former real world. If this guess is true, then it isn’t impossible for it to possess such a precious treasure. But now that such a treasure has appeared, why must we listen to the words of True Son Duo Bao? We can enter this fragment and contest for the sovereignty, and whoever will possess will become a world master.”

chapters.title: Chapter 955 - Kidnapped Halfway
chapters.body:
Chapter 955 - Kidnapped Halfway

Various magnificent lights were shining brilliantly outside the forest due to countless spells being thrown around. Buddha’s halo flickered in the buddha domain with the chanting of buddhist scriptures resounding constantly.

The yin domain, which was originally occupying half of the sky, was suppressed to only half of its original area. When the malicious and vengeful spirits fluttering in the air came in contact with the halo, it was as if they had met their nemesis and directly turned into cyan smoke and dissipated.

Yin Qi looked at the calm and composed buddha son, then congealed a ball of yin energy between his hands and continued revolving and compressing it. Under everyone’s sight, the energy ball transformed into several yin beads which he threw forward.

Buddha son raised his head slightly, and the lotus imprint on his forehead flickered slightly. He examined the yin beads and calmly threw the buddha pearls in his hand.

The two collided with a bright light which illuminated the sky. A six syllable buddha mantra floated out then and was ignited with samadhi flame.

After the collision, the yin beads were destroyed while the buddha pearls continued rushing toward Yin Qi as they burned with samadhi flame. Upon seeing that, vengeful spirits flew out of the yin domain one after another, took form, and collided with the incoming danger.

Yin Qi turned into a blur and retreated into the yin domain with his complexion pale and a hint of lingering fear and annoyance in his eyes. If he had the corpse demon right then, he wouldn’t be in such a disadvantaged position compared to buddha son and wouldn’t need to retreat.

The buddhist doctrines could suppress the yin techniques of Yin Manor.

Yin Qi and buddha son had similar cultivation, both of them were at mid stage of true immortal realm, but the difference between them came from the weapons they were using.

The japamala in buddha son’s hands was a peak postnatal treasure, which was previously used by the buddha master, and was soaked with buddha techniques, which made it extremely powerful.

Yin Manor’s disciples rarely used weapons. The external tools they preferred were the vengeful spirits in their yin domain and corpse demons. The previous yin son of heaven had numerous vengeful spirits, but Yin Qi was not him.

After he was recently bestowed the position of Yin Manor’s young master, Yin Emperor told him about the hidden ancient god’s corpse demon to increase his strength.

But unfortunately for him, when he reached the correct god ruins, someone else had already visited where the corpse demon was and taken it away. Without it, Yin Qi wasn’t an opponent of buddha son, who possessed a peak postnatal treasure.

“Damn that Profound Sword Pavilion!” Yin Qi gloomily cursed as his figure sunk into the yin domain and disappeared without a trace.

The last buddha pearl illuminating the sky stopped in the air and returned to buddha son, who didn’t continue pressing forward. Although Yin Manor and Buddha Clan found each other unpleasant, the quasi sages of both sides were amiable to each other, so the hatred between them hadn’t reached the stage of becoming mortal enemies.

When Yin Qi returned to his yin domain, buddha son did not chase after him.

The fight in the sky had concluded, but the fight on the ground had only started to get intense. Yao Mingwei’s hands turned into a blur as he threw out rays of light which interweaved in the sky and formed a spell formation in front of him.

In the blink of an eye, all sorts of lines arranged themselves in the spell formation, forming a square which was flickering with faint light. Within it, the taoist young master and Duo Bao relied on their methods to suddenly dash forward.

Taoist young master’s white fingers slowly interweaved in the air to form gestures, and the spiritual energy of heaven and earth congealed and compacted around him, which turned the star points in the sky from illusory to real. Sometimes, an ice moon appeared in the sky, and wherever the cold air released from it passed, the lines of the spell formation froze and ruptured.

At other times, a ball of flame appeared instead of the cold moon and emitted dazzling light. Its scorching temperature created formless ripples which invaded the spell formation.

With the sun and moon shining with equal splendor behind the taoist young master, the lines before him ruptured and melted as he walked toward Yao Mingwei at an ordinary pace. Yet from time to time, some spell formation points combined and transformed into illusions that obstructed him.

A charm appeared in the taoist young master’s hand, and he threw it forward. It stuck to the illusion formation and melted it like water. The young men shot it a glance and then continued proceeding toward Yao Mingwei.

True Son Duo Bao was even more formidable. He was someone from a younger generation regarded as a talent by Old Ancestor Do Luo. His condensed domain used countless treasures which formed the stars in the river, and wherever it passed, it destroyed everything.

In terms of existence, the True God was the oldest, but he was followed by Old Ancestor Do Luo. According to rumors, he was alive since the time when ten thousand real worlds were still present. He had made a fortune by doing business, and it had extended to all real worlds.

When the ten thousand worlds were extinguished, Old Ancestor Da Luo formed one of the peak powers of the Goumang Real World, which stood side by side with taoists and Buddha Clan. And both of those were extremely respectful towards Old Ancestor Da Luo.

After the war with the Origin World, Yin Emperor and master of Nine Palaces became quasi sages. In addition, Buddha Clan and taoists also became peak powers, while the Alliance retreated slightly from the frontline. But the quasi sages of the four emperor factions still showed respect to Old Ancestor Da Luo, even if he was only a great principal golden immortal.

It was because of two reasons. First, it was because Old Ancestor Da Luo and Buddha Master were old acquaintances, while Yin Emperor and Nine Palace’s Master had been helped by him when they were weak.

Second, he had survived the calamity which wiped out ten thousand worlds by relying on his strength of great principal golden immortal while even more formidable experts than him died. After something like that, no one would believe that such a person didn’t have any trump cards.

True Son Duo Bao was born in wealth and had used heavenly materials and earthly treasures from the time he began cultivating. Not to mention that Old Ancestor Da Luo had bestowed him with countless peak treasures so as to allow him to possess the most formidable domain.

Countless lines were flying around in the spell formation, but Duo Bao’s expression was calm as the starry river surrounding his body expanded. The stars inside issued dazzling light which rushed toward the lines and crushed them with extreme ease.

The two men were steadily walking forward through the spell formation toward Yao Mingwei. Within a flash, they walked out of the spell formation and arrived in front of Nine Palaces’ young master.

Yao Mingwei coldly snorted, and a spell flag appeared in his hand. It then transformed into a blur that flew toward the spell formation. Instantly, the dots and lines which formed it divided the formation into countless planes. Every surface was like a mirror in which the figures of Duo Bao and taoist young master were reflected.

The countless images in the mirror had different expressions and were waving the weapons in their hands. They formed a few signs with their hands, and countless immortal techniques rushed to attack taoist young master and Duo Bao.

“I want to see whether you two can contend against countless clones with the same strength,” Yao Mingwei said arrogantly. The spell flag he had taken out was the most formidable trick up his sleeve and one of the treasures of Nine Palaces.

The master of nine palaces had been a disciple of spell formation among the taoists, but he left the sect and created Nine Palaces after becoming one of the quasi sages walking the path of spell dao. The spell flag that Yao Mingwei had used was a multi-aspect spell formation created by him.

As long as the enemy got caught inside, countless clones possessing similar strength would be created by the mirrors. They would fight against the people inside until all the mirrors were shattered or the victim died.

The reason why the quasi sages in the Origin World had said that they wouldn’t dare to enter a close combat battle with Nine Palace’s Master was because of the Myriad Spell Formation. Once inside the spell formation, even quasi sages would feel a headache.

“Dao friend, if you don’t remove this Myriad Spell Formation, I will probably smash it with one punch.”

chapters.title: Chapter 960 - Ryukyu Small World
chapters.body:
Chapter 960 - Ryukyu Small World

“Dao friend, you still don’t intend to show yourself? If you don’t appear, this city will disappear because of you! At that time, dao friend, you will suffer the resentment of tens of thousands of souls and your dao foundation will become unstable, which will hamper your cultivation. Don’t blame us then!”

Once Yin Emperor saw that Li Yunmu did not plan to show up, he couldn’t help but threaten him.

When the residents of Asura City heard the words of Yin Emperor, their expressions changed. They didn’t know who was the dao friend that the lord was speaking about, but if he did not show, then did it mean that all of them would die?

The residents of Asura City began to curse Li Yunmu. They were about to be obliterated because of an unknown person, and the sounds of cursing, complaining, and pleading sprang up in all directions.

However, Li Yunmu didn’t hear Yin Emperor’s words. He was in a daze with two godhoods, which were flickering with faint light, floating in his hand.

Li Yunmu had entered a profound state, and he couldn’t move at that moment. His eyes were shut as if he had blended with space, and no presence was emitted from his body. He seemed to have entered another space which had no relation to the outside world.

Unlike his body, which seemed to be completely calm, his spiritual world was in a completely different state. Sometimes, it was like an inferno, while at other times, stormy waves filled it.

After Li Yunmu came out of the night pearl small world, he had put away the countless godhoods. He didn’t intend to use them to become his generation’s emperor monarch.

Instead, he entered a meditative state and began to research godhood’s form. He was sure that the godhoods of other people were an external thing, so only the godhood he cultivated himself would be truly his own.

But although Li Yunmu wasn’t far from the great principal golden immortal realm, it was only his formidable body that was such.

Li Yunmu had yet to congeal a godhood which could be called his own, so he was unable to break through the ceiling of great principal golden immortal. Thus, although he was unrivalled under the quasi sage realm, he couldn’t fight against quasi sages like Yin Emperor.

At that moment, Li Yunmu calmly looked within his spiritual world. After his meditation, he had gained a hint of comprehension.

There were three thousand grand daos under the starry sky, and each great dao represented the existence of a quasi sage. They hadn’t comprehended a grand dao which could be considered their own, so they could only hover around the quasi sage realm.

At that moment, the thing that concerned Li Yunmu was which grand dao’s path he should walk. The question puzzled him, and his mind started getting chaotic once more.

“Forget it, I will walk step by step.”

Li Yunmu looked at the complicated situation in his spiritual world, then shook his head and retreated.

When his soul returned to his body from the spiritual world, he sensed the waves of pressure outside and immediately knew their origin.

“I didn’t expect that these people would be so tasteless. They are surprisingly putting pressure on ordinary people in order to find me.”

Li Yunmu smiled, since the situation was completely unrelated to him. If the quasi sages continued to act arrogantly, he believed that Asura would make his move.

But whether Asura attacked or not, it was unrelated to him.

He turned around and proceeded toward Yin Emperor’s old nest. His goal was Yin Emperor’s small world.

“You idiots, continue staying here. The longer you wait, the better for me it is. Wait until this daddy returns from your small world, then it will be the time to start my plan!”

Before long, Li Yunmu reached the stone room where Yin Emperor had secluded himself. He was a little surprised to see that Yin Emperor had arranged guards after leaving, but could he stop Li Yunmu by relying on two ants?

Li Yunmu moved, and countless threads of black energy left his body. They quickly wrapped around the two men under their terrified gazes.

Until the time they died, they didn’t discover Li Yunmu’s existence and couldn’t send out any mental transmissions. Li Yunmu then sent two shadows to take their place, so that Yin Emperor would not take notice of anything.

After entering the stone room, Li Yunmu first observed everything and found a pearl in the center around which yin energy kept circulating.

“Ryukyu spirit pearl!”

What left Li Yunmu astonished was that Yin Emperor’s small world had such a precious treasure.

He hadn’t expected that Yin Emperor would actually be so lucky. Ryukyu spirit pearl was a precious treasure which could contain a small world, though it was completely different from Asura’s night pearl.

Ryukyu small pearl belonged to Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu of ancient times. It was rich in yin energy and for people who cultivated yin energy, like Yin Emperor, it was the most precious treasure.

After breaking down the restriction around ryukyu spirit pearl, Li Yunmu transformed into a black dot and quickly entered it.

When his legs stepped on land again, he could only see a desolate land extending into the horizon. The sky was ash black without the faintest trace of life.

But Li Yunmu knew that it was false. If there was no life inside, how did Yin Emperor obtain the void origin points from this small world?

Because of that, Li Yunmu began to secretly investigate. Just as he expected, after some observation, he discovered a magnificent city not far away. It was like a human skull with its mouth wide open as if trying to devour everything.

Li Yunmu immediately rushed toward that city. His aim was to plunder everything from the small world!

Just as Li Yunmu reached the sky of the city, countless presences locked onto him. He frowned, finding it unpleasant. It stimulated him, and his presence that shot out after forced all the other presences back.

The people in the city were shocked. The person who floated in the sky not only shattered their presences, but even sent a sharp sword made of demonic energy toward them.

Instantly, all the people who had locked onto Li Yunmu’s presence tried to cut themselves off, but could it be of any use? The demonic energy was still flying toward them with great momentum and soon reached them.

All the people who had released their presence spat out a mouthful of blood and flew away, looking at Li Yunmu who was casually floating in the sky with gazes filled with fear.

The next instant, Li Yunmu fully released his presence, and an earth shattering presence enveloped the entire city. The people in the city bowed down one after another. Their knees soon gave out though, and they knelt down. Immediately after, they felt a relief from the pressure.

chapters.title: Chapter 961 - Emperor’S Goblet
chapters.body:
Chapter 961 - Emperor’S Goblet

Li Yunmu looked at everyone kneeling on the ground without saying a single word. They could sense that the man standing in the sky above the city was the one releasing the terrifying presence from his body!

At that moment, a man quickly flew out of the ancient castle at the center of the city. He wasn’t suppressed by Li Yunmu, but it was very strenuous for him to fly.

“I wonder whether your sire is an envoy of Yin Emperor?” he asked while trembling, afraid for his life. If he offended Li Yunmu, he would be killed on the spot.

But Li Yunmu didn’t like his words. Yin Emperor’s envoy? Yin Emperor was itching to tear him apart limb from limb, but more than that, was he even qualified to have Li Yunmu as his envoy?!

Because of that, Li Yunmu waved his hand and a thread of black energy wrapped around the person who had flown out of the castle. The black energy instantly covered his entire body, and the man fell from the sky. He crashed into the ground while gasping for breath.

Li Yunmu didn’t kill him, just penalized him, since he still needed him for the things he was about to do.

“Wake him up!” Li Yunmu expressionlessly said.

After hearing his words, the people nearby rushed over with healing medicine. It took a good minute for the man to slowly stand up while coughing.

He was extremely weak and completely bewildered. How exactly did he offend the lord? Why did the lord give him such a strict punishment as soon as he approached him?

“Yin Emperor? Is he even capable of making me his envoy?” Li Yunmu’s words resounded in everyone’s ears like thunder.

For a moment, the entire city descended into a commotion. Who was this person who was so crazy to enter Yin Emperor’s small world? But after experiencing Li Yunmu’s power first hand, no one dared to say anything.

At this time, the person who had been punished understood how exactly he had offended the man in the sky, and he grew terrified.

That person paused, then shot a glance at the residents kneeling on the ground because of Li Yunmu’s presence. He couldn’t help but summon his courage again and ask, “Lord, this lowly one has accidentally offended lord, but I don’t know why has lord come to Yin Cloud City?”

“Who are you?”

“This lowly one is the master of Yin Cloud City, lord. I wonder if you can remove your presence. I am afraid after another hour…”

Li Yunmu coldly looked at him, but scattered his presence. The people below were his future source of void origin points, so he couldn’t afford to let them die.

“I have come this time in order to give you a chance,” Li Yunmu with an expressionless face.

When the people underneath heard him, they looked at each other, not knowing what exactly was this opportunity that he was talking about. But they were extremely terrified of Li Yunmu. After all, they had all sensed the presence he had released.

“I don’t know what is this opportunity that lord is talking about…”

Li Yumu heard the city master’s enquiry and waved his large hand to absorb all the people underneath into his heavenly world.

“The opportunity to become my people from today onwards!”

The city master was stupefied. He knew that Li Yumu was crazy and not afraid of Yin Emperor who ruled over them, but he did not expect that Li Yunmu would dare to snatch Yin Emperor’s people.

“This… lord, where did they go… If lord Yin Emperor learns of this…”

At that moment, the city lord was panic-stricken. On one hand, he was afraid that Li Yunmu was going to kill him, but on other hand, if Yin Emperor learned of this matter, he wouldn’t be able to escape responsibility either.

“Do you have any other choice? I am lacking a servant here, so you’ll become it!” Li Yunmu said with disapproval in his voice. Even if Yin Emperor came, he had the confidence to escape unscathed.

What was more, Yin Emperor was in Asura City at that moment, trying to find him. He and the other three quasi sages hated him to bone, so they were ready to do anything to find him, but as the master of Asura City, how could Asura let them do as they please?

At that moment, Li Yunmu could do as he wished.

“Lord, I am a lowly city master, I fear…”

Due to his terror of Yin Emperor’s might, the city lord tried his best to refuse Li Yunmu. After all, Yin Emperor was the chief of the small world, just like a god!

“Then you will only be useful if you are dead!”

Li Yunmu wrinkled his brows. He was feeling extremely unhappy in his heart, and he quickly congealed the black energy to kill the man before him.Read more chapter on AllNovel

Upon seeing that, the city master became extremely terrified. He suddenly understood that even if Yin Emperor was more powerful, his little life was in the hands of the stranger who stood before him, he hurried forward to beg for forgiveness.

“Lord, spare my life…”

But before he could finish speaking, Li Yunmu’s black cloud wrapped tightly around him. The city master’s vitality was then instantly sapped. He was just an ant, so why would Li Yunmu give him the opportunity to beg for forgiveness?

Soon after that, Li Yunmu found the deputy city master of Yin Cloud City within his heavenly world. Once the deputy city master was called out, he understood that Li Yunmu wasn’t someone they could deal with.

The deputy city master was an intelligent person, so once he appeared, he immediately went down on his knees.

“Lord, what are your instructions? This little one will do his utmost to accomplish all you ask!”

Li Yunmu looked at him and indifferently said, “Explain the situation of this Ryukyu Small World to me.”

“Reporting to lord, this Ryukyu Small World has an extremely large area with numerous cities. We are considered as a fourth grade city, so there are many more formidable cities above us.”

When the deputy city master saw that Li Yunmu wasn’t replying, he continued after a pause. “Ryukyu Small World has a unique characteristic, and it is that the yin energy here is extremely profound. Because of it, almost no one goes outside at night, but naturally, that isn’t important for someone like the lord.”

Li Yunmu was extremely excited after hearing this information. Previously, he had understood that Ryukyu Spirit World was a precious treasure with extremely profound yin energy, but Yin Emperor was only using it as a container for a small world which was quite a waste of such a treasure.

Li Yunmu had come to Ryukyu Small World in order to devour Yin Emperor’s void origin points and to obtain the ryukyu spirit pearl.

The system had previously told him that there was a goblet left behind by Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu which contained his life essence.

What kind of character was Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu? He was a hegemon of a part of the world from ancient times, and his life essence was enough for people to enjoy it endlessly.

However, not many people knew that the ryukyu spirit pearl which Yin Emperor had obtained wasn’t only a yin treasure.

Since you don’t know what’s what, I will take Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu’s goblet off your hands, Li Yunmu thought in his heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 962 - Yin Imperial Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 962 - Yin Imperial Palace

After making a plan, Li Yunmu turned to the deputy city master, “Which region is the richest in yin energy in the Ryukyu Small World?”

The deputy city master did not hesitate to answer him. “Reporting to lord, this lowly one doesn’t know which region is the richest in yin energy. But to the south of our Yin Cloud City, there is a first grade city. I believe that everything the lord wants to know can be learned there.”

Li Yunmu faintly glanced at the deputy city master. He knew why he was told to go to the first grade city. When he reached it, some expert there would deal with him.

But the deputy city master underestimated Li Yunmu’s strength. Although he could not defeat Yin Emperor, there was no one in the Ryukyu Small World who could fight him.

“Hmph, you want me to go there and find my death?”

Li Yunmu coldly snorted. He hadn’t thought that the people of the Ryukyu Small World would be such idiots. He then waved his hand and blasted the deputy city master out of existence without giving him any chance to say anything.

After that, Li Yunmu flew toward the first grade city just like the deputy city master had wanted. When he reached it, he saw that it wasn’t a small city like Yin Cloud City.

The first grade city was extremely prosperous, with people going in and out of the city all the time. Li Yunmu wasn’t very anxious to complete his objective, so he descended on the ground and slowly walked inside through the city gate.

He didn’t go to the city master’s residence this time, but entered a small tavern and found a corner to sit down. There, he began to listen to the conversations between the visitors of the tavern.

“Hey, did you hear, Yin Imperial Palace will open up after seven days!”

“What? It’s being opened in advance this time!”

“That’s only natural. I also heard that the city master invited the elites of all cities, and even Young Master Yin Xuan came out of seclusion.”

“What a pity, only those people who can cultivate to heavenly tribulation stage or higher within a hundred years can enter the Yin Imperial Palace. Otherwise, people like us would get to try their luck too.”

When Li Yunmu heard the conversation between two men, he became extremely curious. The system, which had been silent until then, chose that moment to speak.

[If my guess isn’t wrong, Yin Imperial Palace should be the location of the goblet!]

“But why is the requirement of the emperor goblet that a person should reach heavenly tribulation stage or higher in less than a hundred years?”

System smiled, then said disdainfully. [Ha ha, it is possible that this is the requirement to awaken the emperor goblet and find a descendant.]

Among the immortals, the Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu was an ancient sage who had proclaimed himself a hegemon. But in the end, his name only existed in the passing down of his knowledge and cultivation methods to the younger generation.

Only his fame remained, but even it had diminished with time. Any small thing could result in his lineage vanishing completely.

[This emperor goblet is extremely useful for you. You may be able to use it to break through to the great principal golden immortal realm or even become a quasi sage.]

Li Yunmu’s eyes began to shine after hearing the system’s words. He hadn’t expected that the emperor goblet would have such formidable energy. It seemed like he had to make a trip for it.

But he didn’t know how he could enter Yin Imperial Palace, so he stood up and walked to the two men who had been talking earlier.

He looked at the two of them and asked with a faint smile, “Hearing the two of you talk, this lowly me became extremely curious. I wonder, how does one enter the Yin Imperial Palace?”

“Who are you? If you ask me to speak, then I will speak—”

Before the person could finish speaking, Li Yunmu slightly unleashed his presence, so only the two men could sense it. The speaker immediately shut his mouth in astonishment.

Li Yunmu was still smiling, but there was an extremely threatening look in his eyes. After the two men felt his presence, they became afraid that he would erase them both with a wave of his hand, and one of them hurriedly spoke up.

“My lord, just a moment ago this lowly one failed to recognize you. Sire must register at the city master’s residence to enter the Yin Imperial Palace. Only those who have cultivated to heavenly tribulation stage or higher in less than a hundred years are allowed to enter.”

Li Yunmu nodded, then left. The two men heaved a sigh of relief, but their clothes were already filled with cold sweat. They knew that they had narrowly escaped death, and after glancing at each other, they had a tacit understanding that they would keep the matter in their hearts and not mention it to anyone.

Li Yunmu quickly went to the city master’s residence. While on his way, he questioned the people of Yin Cloud City whom he had captured in his heavenly world. From them, he understood that the heavenly tribulation realm in the Ryukyu Small World was roughly equivalent to the tribulation passing stage in the night pearl small world.

Li Yunmu then decided to suppress his cultivation to the initial stage of true immortal realm. That way, he could be counted among the upper middle tier in terms of strength among the people entering the Yin Imperial Palace.

What astonished Li Yunmu was that the city master’s residence didn’t have a strict control over who participated. After only testing his age and realm, they gave him a command tile and informed him to come in front of Yin Imperial Palace after seven days. After that, they didn’t pay him any more attention.

Li Yunmu felt that Yin Imperial Palace wasn’t as simple as he had imagined, so he decided to scout it out before doing anything rash.

At night, he figured out the position of Yin Imperial Palace and went to visit it. When he got close to it, he was extremely astonished.

The Yin Imperial Palace in front of him was an old tomb which resembled an imperial palace that had been built many years ago.

The moment Li Yunmu got close to it, he could sense the pressure it emitted. Yin Imperial Palace, the three words written on a board were hanging high above the large stone gate and added a hint of grandiose to the old tomb.

Just from looking at the old tomb, Li Yunmu could understand what kind of person Heavenly Emperor Ryukyu was when he was alive. He had surprisingly established a grand tomb which resembled a palace for himself.

Just when Li Yunmu wondered whether he should enter the tomb in front of him, he felt a sense of deep crisis and quickly rushed backwards.

Under his gaze, more than ten strands of yin energy transformed into long dragons and hovered where he had been standing just a moment ago. If Li Yunmu hadn’t escaped in time, the yin energy dragons would have entered his body.

The trouble to get them out could only be imagined easily.

Li Yunmu’s expression turned solemn. He realized that he couldn’t force his way inside and needed to wait for seven days to enter with the people of the city master’s residence.

He then quietly returned to the first grade city and found a family inn to stay.

Seven days passed in a flash, and Li Yunmu arrived in front of the Yin Imperial Palace. At that moment, a lot of people had already gathered there, and the majority of them had young faces.

A middle-aged man was standing at the front and was pointing at something. If Li Yunmu did not guess wrong, then that person was the city master of the first grade city.

His eyes darted around the scene, and once he saw that the majority of people were present, he nodded to himself.

“Almost everyone has gathered, so prepare to set off!”

chapters.title: Chapter 966 - An Ancient Secret
chapters.body:
Chapter 966 - An Ancient Secret

At that moment, Xiao Rong was thinking that he had already dealt with Li Yunmu and was busy looking at the ocean monarch stones. He could feel an enormous amount of energy accumulated within them.

Out of nowhere then, he sensed a ferocious hostile intent coming toward him. He turned around and saw a long black dragon rushing straight at him. On top of that, its presence was even more formidable compared to that of the previous attack.

It hadn’t even crossed Xiao Rong’s mind that after he offered such beneficial conditions and even agreed to share his women that the youngster wouldn’t appreciate his kindness. When they left, he had to ask his father to turn the unfamiliar youth into mincemeat!

While he was thinking about it, he took out another charm, which was identical to the previous one. It was quickly destroyed and formed a golden shield around him.

Xiao Rong’s heart was aching badly. On the last trip to Yin Imperial Palace, he had obtained three charms in total. He had used one of them previously, and now that he came in contact with the unknown youth, he was forced to use the remaining two charms.

His hatred for Li Yunmu became even deeper as the attack hit his defensive shield and dissipated like before.

Li Yunmu had planned to launch another attack after that, but he hadn’t expected that the first holy son would spring away like a rabbit and escape suddenly, leaving behind the women he had bought with him.

At that moment, they all turned deathly pale and looked at Li Yunmu with frightened expressions. Even the first holy son of Ryukyu Small World wasn’t his opponent, so what could they do?

They were afraid that Li Yunmu would casually dispose of them, and one of the women knelt on the ground and kowtowed while trembling. “Lord, please don’t kill me. I am willing to serve lord for eternity.”

When the other women saw this, they also followed suit.

Li Yunmu looked at them and saw that all of them were in the heavenly tribulation realm, but they were ready to turn into his property to save their lives. It was the cruelty of the cultivation world.

“Stand up. I am not interested in your bodies. Do you all want revenge though?”

Li Yunmu naturally wouldn’t be interested in ordinary oil and common powder, but he could collect them into his heavenly world.

The women looked at each other, not understanding the meaning of ‘revenge’ which he had mentioned. But in order to live, they hurriedly said, “I am willing!”

Li Yunmu faintly smiled and waved his hand to collect them into his heavenly world. Then, he also entered inside and arranged for the women to stay by the side of the box in which the gods were imprisoned.

The women could sense a powerful might from the imprisoned people. Their expressions changed again, since they hadn’t expected that Li Yunmu would be so formidable that he could capture such powerful people.

After seeing that, the women abandoned all the small schemes they had thought to use. They realized that even if they cultivated for a lifetime, they wouldn’t be able to fight Li Yunmu.

Once they sincerely surrendered, Li Yunmu said,”You all cultivate here, in my world. After some time, Xiao Rong will join you. Until then, you can think about how you’re going to take your revenge.”

“This lowly one understands.”

Soon after, Li Yunmu retreated from the heavenly world. He then returned to the Solitary Ignition Sword. He went along the chains and collected the ocean monarch stones into his heavenly world, then examined the four iron chains and collected them as well.

The Solitary Ignition Sword, which wasn’t being subdued anymore, began to tremble at that moment. It also released a heaven-defying killing intent.

Li Yunmu felt that the sword spirit was about to awaken, so he hurriedly took hold of the sword hilt.

Gloom, vengeance, and killing intent rushed into his mind, but a brilliant radiance erupted from his body at the same time, as his experience points and space elements were sapped away to resist the sword spirit.

The sword spirit was a very famous Crown Prince Chang Qin, who was the son of Fire God Zhurong. He had gone to Buzhou Mountain to capture the black dragon, but was betrayed by his close friend water snake Qian Yu.

Forgetting my kindness and causing the Buzhou Mountain to collapse… You stole my immortal status and partitioned my soul, which I can’t forgive! If I get the opportunity, I will definitely take revenge!

Although the resentment of the sword spirit was suppressed by the system, it continued howling in Li Yunmu’s mind. However, he continued pouring in experience points and space elements until it was sealed again.

Once it was over, it left behind its experiences of a lifetime together with its resentment in Li Yunmu’s mind.

Li Yunmu closed his eyes and digested Chang Qin’s experiences. IN the end, he shook his head. The spirit could be considered a pitiful person, so since it had to follow Li Yunmu, he would certainly get revenge for Chang Qin if he ever got the opportunity.

A voice echoed in Li Yunmu’s mind.

[Article Obtained: Solitary Ignition Sword (sealed)

[Grade: SSS

[Ability: solitary ignition baleful energy, Devil Burning Epoch (sealed)

[Note: this sword is extremely formidable. Only remove the seal after host’s strength has reached the corresponding level.]

[I hadn’t expected that you would be able to obtain it!] the system said in astonishment.

“What’s the deal with this sword?” Li Yunmu asked the system after some thought.

[Truthfully speaking, I also don’t know!] the system said helplessly.

“Don’t tell me, there’s really something you don’t know? This sword spirit is called Chang Qin, and he is the son of god of fire. But Zhurong was only a trifling ancient god, so why is he known as a god of ancient times? Furthermore, how did this sword become a sovereign weapon?”

All of a sudden, many questions appeared in Li Yunmu’s heart. He had killed the fire god and even his master Nuwa with his own hands. So why when the soul of Zhurong’s son was poured into a weapon, that weapon became so formidable? The progression of events left Li Yunmu completely puzzled.

“That Zhurong was only a creature like your shadows, a projection. The true god of fire was much more formidable compared to Zhurong.”

Li Yunmu was stunned. Was there another Zhurong in the world? Then how many Nuwas were there? What about Fuxi? Furthermore, what about the Primordial God World destroyed by him?

The system knew that Li Yunmu wouldn’t be able to accept it, but when all was said and done, it was an ancient secret. The number of people who knew it could be counted on one hand.

The system paused for a moment, then continued, [The real Primordial God World isn’t in this star field, and the people of that place are existences comparable to me and some are even more formidable than me!]

Hiss…

Li Yunmu felt a chill run down his spine. The system had given him a great surprise. He hadn’t expected that it would say something like that— that after suffering untold hardships, what he destroyed was only the projection of the Primordial God World and nothing more.

[I will not tell you anything more than you should now. They aren’t people whom you can come in contact with for now!]

Li Yunmu sneered at that. “Then when will I be able? After I become an emperor? Or a sovereign?”

[When the time comes, I will naturally tell you. Also, I am somewhat tired now. Don’t call me before you find the emperor’s goblet…] the system said. It knew that the matter left Li Yunmu in shock, but it could not be changed.

When he thought he had reached the peak, it came and told him, “Congratulations for becoming an ant”.

How could he not be angered by something like that? So the system had to give him some time to calm himself.

chapters.title: Chapter 967 - : Moment Of Enlightenment
chapters.body:
Chapter 967 - : Moment Of Enlightenment

Li Yunmu felt completely abysmal at that moment. He had believed that the system was the most formidable existence, but there actually existed many formidable existences similar to it in the world.

What made him feel the most tired, however, was that he had been walking his path for a long time already. He was pushed by one matter after another, and from a helpless ordinary person, he had come to be a formidable existence.

But from the start to end, he had never seen the end of his path. Then why was he still continuing cultivation? Even if he cultivated and became a powerhouse like the system, what would happen then?

What about the existences more powerful than the system? Would he still have to continue cultivating to catch up to them?

At that moment, Li Yunmu’s heart was in complete chaos. He suddenly realized that he didn’t have any goal and was being pulled like a puppet by someone.

He hadn’t wanted this sort of life, but he was only a loser without any far-reaching goals and ambitions before he obtained the system. All he had wished for at that time was to not be a chess piece for others.

Right now though, he felt that living as an ordinary person was very good…

While thinking about it, Li Yunmu sat down cross-legged and restrained his presence completely. At that moment, he had encountered the first threshold in his cultivation journey and he couldn’t just rush past it.

Li Yunmu sat in a meditative state like an old monk until dust collected on his shoulders and head, but he didn’t even brush them away.

He was like a statue, completely motionless. His thoughts became slower, and he stopped thinking about everything. All he wanted right then was to continue sitting like he was, for he felt very comfortable at that moment.

With him in that state, half a year passed in a flash. By then, Li Yunmu’s body was already covered by a deep layer of dust, and the young talents who had entered the Yin Imperial Palace had withdrawn a long time ago.

None of them remembered the unremarkable youth who had entered the place together with them.

[Stupid! You are beyond cure!]

When the system’s cold voice resounded in Li Yunmu’s brain, his eyelashes flickered, and dust fell off them. He slowly opened his eyes.

During the whole half a year, he hadn’t done anything. He just put away all other matters from his mind and recalled everything from the beginning.

It made him realize that he had really become tired over the years. He recalled the joy when he first obtained the system, remembered his first shadow Li Yun, and the days of the school.

He remembered the people he met during the journey and also remembered his mom and dad as well as older sister.

“Why you calling me stupid? I’m feeling extremely comfortable right now.”

Li Yunmu took a deep breath and his body trembled, which threw the dust away. He then shook his head to relax his stiff neck.

The system sighed. When it had told Li Yunmu about things that were beyond him, it was certain that Li Yunmu would fall into a loop, but it hadn’t expected that he would remain trapped for so long.

The system knew that Li Yunmu had been walking on a knife’s edge throughout the years, experiencing countless crises and tribulations as well as being ridiculed by countless people. He had to go through many things to reach his level

But Li Yunmu lacked one thing, and that was the spirit of a powerhouse. He needed a lofty heart to obtain his ideals, be unafraid to sail against the currents and face difficulties.

If heavens obstruct me, then I will destroy them. If earth tricks me, then I will break it open.

It was the mentality that a powerhouse should possess. No person who was able to become an almighty did not possess a staunch resolve and heaven-defying life.

But Li Yunmu, who was born in an ordinary family, didn’t have this sort of thinking. Ever since Earth experienced the Dark Ages, a fixed thinking had become deep-rooted in its people.

Only those with formidable bloodline could become powerhouse, and only those who became powerhouses could have a good life.

And Li Yunmu, who was an ordinary person previously, felt that he was an ordinary person who wouldn’t be able to stand out among his peers. Thus, the mentality of a powerhouse was deeply buried at the bottom of his heart and never seen.

The system had informed him about the matter of ancient times in hopes that he could see the light of day and reach the glory of days long past.

Li Yunmu possessed the bloodline of an ancient war saint, so how could the system be willing to watch blankly as this bloodline fell into oblivion. Therefore, it deliberately told Li Yunmu about things he should not know to put some pressure on him.

It should have aroused his fighting spirit and desire to surpass those ancient existences, so he would put even more effort into cultivation. But what caught the system unprepared was that Li Yunmu’s inferiority complex was extremely great.

He and his father had been completely ordinary, so after Li Yunmu obtained the system, he crazily drew on its support to achieve the life he wanted.

But a voice echoed again and again in his heart, and it said that if he didn’t possess the system, he would be nothing, just a loser bullied by everyone!

So when Li Yunmu heard that there were surprisingly many existences at the same level as the system, he did not feel resentful. Instead, he became scared. He was afraid of losing, afraid that he wouldn’t be able to defeat those people and might even be killed.

Because of that, he sealed himself for half a year.

If the system didn’t call on him, he would have remained with his mind shut off for even longer. But the system couldn’t continue watching Li Yunmu being so depressed.

It chose to sneer at him then and said, [A few trifling existences from the ancient past have terrified you to this extent? It seems like your achievements will stop here.]

Li Yunmu didn’t reply. He stood up and began to move his hand and feet. After staying in the stone room for half a year, his limbs had become rigid.

When the system saw that Li Yunmu wasn’t replying, it felt resentful and roared angrily, [You are a coward! Do you know why those ancient existences have been dormant for so many years and why I ended up with this type of body?]

“What does that have to do with me!” Li Yunmu coldly said.

The system was about to rain abuses on Li Yunmu when it heard him speak with anger in his voice. “Some existences from ancient times? I am a man, so how could I be afraid of them! If they provoke me, then I will wipe them out.”

[You figured it out?] the system asked blankly.

“What is there to understand?” Li Yunmu asked rhetorically. “Don’t these creatures of ancient times possess a body of blood and flesh? Don’t they die? Then what’s there to understand?”

His continuous questions left the system dumbstruck.

“I was born as an ordinary person, yet there are so many powerhouses afraid of me right now! So what do those ancient existences count as! I, Li Yunmu, will tell you now that only I can become the true master of the heavens!”

After those words, Li Yunmu’s presence exploded, creating an enormous shockwave which formed a vacuum.

Within half a year, Li Yunmu’s mentality of a powerhouse had been roused, and his strength had advanced to the next level.

Such latent potential was extremely terrifying!

chapters.title: Chapter 969 - 969 Spirit Refining Spell
chapters.body:
Chapter 969 - 969 Spirit Refining Spell

969 Spirit Refining Spell

Li Yunmu was different, however. He was a great principal golden immortal powerhouse for a long time, so how could he not sense their presence. But even if he let their daggers reach his body, he wouldn’t be injured in the slightest.

It was because of the restriction on the space-time spirits. In every generation, only one of them could break through the tribulation passing stage and enter the immortal realm. That person would then become the leader of that generation.

Li Yunmu soon discovered that one of the five space-time spirits attacking him was injured. It should be the one who had tried to take him down previously.

It was quite a surprise that instead of escaping from the Yin Imperial Palace, it called its companions and continued to sneak attack young talents.

Apparently, the space-time spirits had some deep and mysterious connection with Ryukyu Sage.

At that moment, Li Yunmu could clearly sense the killing intent in the eyes of the space-time spirits. Their daggers wanted to taste his blood as soon as possible.
